34820.title: Are Government Bonds Safe in Times of War and Pandemic?
34820.zh_title: 政府债券在战争和疫情期间是否安全？
34820.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Hanno Lustig, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Mindy Z. Xiaolan
34820.abstract: We analyze real returns on U.S. and U.K. government debt during major wars and the COVID-19 pandemic over the past three centuries. Wars are associated with sharply negative real returns on outstanding government debt, with returns falling far below economic growth, in contrast to peacetime periods when returns exceed growth. Elevated surprise inflation and financial repression account for a cumulative 30% wedge between returns and growth over four years of war, implying that bondholders bear a substantial share of wartime fiscal costs. During wartime, government bonds also systematically underperform risky assets.
34820.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在过去三个世纪的主要战争和COVID-19疫情期间，美国和英国政府债务的实际回报率。战争与未偿政府债务的急剧负实际回报率相关，回报率远低于经济增长，这与和平时期回报率超过增长的情况形成对比。在四年的战争期间，高企的意外通胀和金融抑制共同导致了回报率与增长率之间累计30%的差距，这意味着债券持有人承担了战时财政成本的很大一部分。在战争期间，政府债券的表现也系统性逊于风险资产。
34820.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E43, E58, E6, E63

34819.title: Financial Incentives, Health Screening, and Selection into Mental Health Care: Experimental Evidence from College Students in India
34819.zh_title: 经济激励、健康筛查与心理健康护理的选择：来自印度大学生的实验证据
34819.authors: Emily Breza, Kevin Carney, Vijaya Raghavan, Kailash Rajah, Thara Rangaswamy, Gautam Rao, Frank Schilbach, Sobia Shadbar, James Stratton
34819.abstract: In an RCT with college students in Chennai (N=340), we test how modest financial incentives and personalized feedback affect the uptake and targeting (by symptom severity) of free therapy. Despite 56% of students screening positive for at least mild depression or anxiety, only 3% in the control group took up therapy. A small cash incentive increased appointments by 9 percentage points (p = 0.06) on average without substantially affecting targeting. Personalized feedback and recommendations based on a mental health screening tool significantly improved targeting while keeping overall take-up largely unchanged. Combining these two treatments achieved both higher take-up and improved targeting, by increasing appointments among symptomatic individuals by 21 pp (p < 0.01) without affecting uptake by asymptomatic individuals. These findings suggest that low-cost incentives coupled with screening information can effectively increase uptake while allocating limited mental health care resources to those with greater need.
34819.zh_abstract: 在一项针对金奈（N=340）大学生的随机对照试验中，我们测试了适度的经济激励和个性化反馈如何影响免费心理治疗的接受率及其针对性（按症状严重程度）。尽管56%的学生筛查出至少存在轻度抑郁或焦虑，但对照组中只有3%接受了治疗。一笔小额现金激励平均使预约率提高了9个百分点（p = 0.06），但对针对性没有实质性影响。基于心理健康筛查工具的个性化反馈和建议显著改善了针对性，同时总体接受率基本保持不变。将这两种干预措施结合使用，既实现了更高的接受率，又改善了针对性，使有症状个体的预约率提高了21个百分点（p < 0.01），且不影响无症状个体的接受率。这些发现表明，低成本的激励措施与筛查信息相结合，可以有效地提高接受率，同时将有限的心理健康护理资源配置给更有需求的人群。

34818.title: Residential Segregation and Unequal Access to Local Public Services in India: Evidence from 1.5m Neighborhoods
34818.zh_title: 印度居住隔离与地方公共服务获取的不平等：来自150万个邻里的证据
34818.authors: Sam Asher, Kritarth Jha, Paul Novosad, Anjali Adukia, Brandon Tan
34818.abstract: We study residential segregation and access to public services across 1.5 million urban and rural neighborhoods in India. Muslim and Scheduled Caste segregation in India is high by global standards, and only slightly lower than Black-White segregation in the U.S. Within cities, public facilities and infrastructure are systematically less available in Muslim and Scheduled Caste neighborhoods. Nearly all regressive allocation is across neighborhoods within cities—at the most informal and least studied form of government. These inequalities are not visible in the aggregate data typically used for research and policy.
34818.zh_abstract: 我们研究了印度150万个城乡邻里的居住隔离和公共服务获取情况。印度的穆斯林和表列种姓隔离程度按全球标准来看很高，仅略低于美国的黑白隔离水平。在城市内部，公共设施和基础设施在穆斯林和表列种姓邻里中系统性较少。几乎所有倒退性的资源配置都发生在城市内部的邻里之间——这是最非正式且研究最少的政府层面。这些不平等在通常用于研究和政策的汇总数据中并不明显。
34818.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：H4, H41, I24, J15, O15, R12, R13, R23

34817.title: International Currency Dominance
34817.authors: Joseph Abadi, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Daniel Sanches
34817.abstract: We present a micro-founded monetary model of the world economy to study international currency competition. Our model features "unipolar'' equilibria, with a single dominant international currency, and "multipolar'' equilibria, in which multiple currencies circulate internationally. Long-run equilibria are highly history-dependent and tend towards the emergence of a dominant currency. Governments can compete to internationalize their currencies by offering attractive interest rates on their sovereign debt, but large economies have a natural advantage in ensuring the dominance of their currencies. We calibrate the model to assess the quantitative importance of these mechanisms and study the international monetary system's dynamics under several counterfactual scenarios.
34817.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个基于微观基础的世界经济货币模型，以研究国际货币竞争。我们的模型具有“单极”均衡（单一主导国际货币）和“多极”均衡（多种货币在国际上流通）的特征。长期均衡高度依赖于历史路径，并倾向于出现一种主导货币。政府可以通过为其主权债务提供有吸引力的利率来竞争使其货币国际化，但大型经济体在确保其货币主导地位方面具有天然优势。我们对模型进行校准，以评估这些机制的定量重要性，并研究在几种反事实情景下国际货币体系的动态变化。

34816.title: Extractive Taxation and the French Revolution
34816.zh_title: 榨取性税收与法国大革命
34816.authors: Tommaso Giommoni, Gabriel Loumeau, Marco Tabellini
34816.abstract: In this paper, we provide systematic evidence in support of the long-standing hypothesis that taxation was an important driver of the French Revolution. We first document that areas with heavier taxes experienced more riots between 1750 and 1789 and voiced more complaints against taxation in the cahiers de doléances of 1789. After showing that these effects are driven by indirect taxes, we exploit sharp spatial differences in the salt tax and the traites—the two principal indirect levies—to implement a regression discontinuity design (RDD).We find that unrest was higher on the high-tax side of the border. These effects intensified over time, peaking in the 1780s, and were stronger where fiscal disparities were larger and Enlightenment ideas more widespread. We further show that adverse weather shocks amplified unrest in high-tax municipalities. We then document that taxation fueled the spread of unrest during the Grande Peur—the wave of revolts that swept France in July 1789 and culminated in the abolition of feudal privileges. Finally, we link taxation to revolutionary politics in Paris, documenting that deputies from heavily taxed constituencies were more likely to frame the tax system as oppressive, support the Revolution, demand the abolition of the monarchy, and vote for the king’s execution.
34816.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了系统性证据，支持税收是法国大革命重要驱动因素这一长期存在的假说。我们首先证明，在1750年至1789年间，税收负担较重的地区发生了更多的骚乱，并在1789年的《陈情书》中表达了对税收更多的抱怨。在表明这些影响是由间接税驱动之后，我们利用盐税和关税（两种主要的间接税）在空间上的显著差异，实施了一个断点回归设计。我们发现，在边境高税收一侧的动乱更高。这些影响随时间推移而加剧，在1780年代达到顶峰，并且在财政差距更大和启蒙思想更普及的地区更为强烈。我们进一步证明，不利的天气冲击加剧了高税收市镇的动乱。然后，我们记录了税收如何助长了“大恐慌”期间动乱的蔓延——这场席卷法国并于1789年7月达到顶峰、最终废除封建特权的起义浪潮。最后，我们将税收与巴黎的革命政治联系起来，证明来自高税收选区的代表更有可能将税收制度描述为压迫性的、支持革命、要求废除君主制，并投票支持处决国王。
34816.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, POL；JEL：D74, H20, H31, N43, O23

34815.title: Screen More, Sell Later: Screening and Dynamic Signaling in the Mortgage Market
34815.zh_title: 更多筛查，更晚出售：抵押贷款市场中的筛查与动态信号传递
34815.authors: Manuel Adelino, Bin Wei, Feng Zhao
34815.abstract: We develop a dynamic model of asset origination with unobservable screening effort and signaling of loan quality through delayed sale by extending Vanasco (2017). The theory predicts a positive relationship between screening effort and the strength of the signal. We test this central prediction using U.S. mortgage data, measuring screening effort by mortgage processing time. Consistent with the theory, loans that take longer to process are sold with longer delay and are less likely to default, even though observably riskier loans are processed more slowly. Our calibration reveals that the subprime mortgage market operated in a parameter range with endogenous fragility.
34815.zh_abstract: 我们通过扩展Vanasco (2017)的模型，发展了一个关于资产发起的动态模型，其中包含不可观测的筛查努力以及通过延迟出售来传递贷款质量的信号。该理论预测筛查努力与信号强度之间存在正相关关系。我们使用美国抵押贷款数据检验了这一核心预测，以抵押贷款处理时间衡量筛查努力。与理论一致，处理时间更长的贷款被出售时延迟更长，且违约可能性更低，尽管可观测风险更高的贷款处理得更慢。我们的校准显示，次贷抵押贷款市场在一个具有内生脆弱性的参数区间内运行。
34815.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G01, G21, G23, G32, R30

34814.title: Interest Rates and Equity Valuations
34814.abstract: A large body of work has sought to measure the effect of interest rates on equity valuations. The challenge in doing so is that both are endogenous, and their comovement depends on the forces driving interest-rate changes. To address this problem, we develop and estimate a decomposition that splits movements in real rates into three structural drivers: changes in expected growth, risk, or “pure discounting.” We show that only pure discount-rate shocks transmit one-for-one to equity valuations, with little or negative transmission of growth and risk shocks. Implementing our decomposition with a global panel of growth expectations and asset prices, we find a weak unconditional relation between valuations and real rates but a strong relation with the pure discounting component, which explains 80% of cross-country valuation changes since 1990. In the U.S., we find that 35% of the interest-rate decline is attributable to pure discounting, implying that only a fraction of the change in rates has passed through directly to equities. We use the decomposition to revisit evidence on the role of interest rates in explaining price variation, and to study higher-frequency returns, cross-sectional rate exposures, duration-matched equity premia, and reactions to monetary policy.
34814.zh_abstract: 大量研究试图衡量利率对股票估值的影响。这样做的挑战在于两者都是内生的，它们的共同变动取决于驱动利率变化的因素。为了解决这个问题，我们开发并估计了一种分解方法，将实际利率的变动分解为三个结构性驱动因素：预期增长的变化、风险的变化或“纯贴现”的变化。我们表明，只有纯贴现率冲击会一对一地传导至股票估值，而增长和风险冲击的传导作用很小甚至为负。使用全球增长预期和资产价格面板数据实施我们的分解，我们发现估值与实际利率之间存在微弱的不条件关系，但与纯贴现成分存在强关系，这解释了自1990年以来80%的跨国估值变化。在美国，我们发现35%的利率下降可归因于纯贴现，这意味着只有一部分利率变化直接传导至股票。我们利用这种分解重新审视了利率在解释价格变动中的作用证据，并研究了更高频率的回报、横截面利率敞口、久期匹配的股权溢价以及对货币政策的反应。

34813.title: The Politics of AI
34813.abstract: Using new data from the Gallup Workforce Panel, we show that the apparent partisan divide in workplace AI adoption is largely an artifact of educational and occupational sorting rather than ideological differences in technology adoption. While Democrats are consistently more likely than Republicans to report frequent AI use—30.1% versus 25% in Q1:2026—and exhibit deeper task-level integration across a broader range of work activities, this raw gap shrinks to statistical insignificance once we control for educational attainment, and reverses sign in fully saturated models with occupation and industry fixed effects. Democrats work in more AI-exposed occupations and more AI-supportive organizational environments, but these differences reflect where people work and what skills they hold, not political identity per se. The one dimension that resists this compositional explanation is perceived job displacement risk: partisan differences were statistically indistinguishable through 2025 but a 4.2 percentage point gap has emerged by Q1:2026, suggesting that belief divergence may be beginning to outpace the structural factors that explain behavioral differences. In this sense, the “politics of AI” is better understood as the political geography of human capital and occupational structure than as an ideological cleavage in technology adoption.
34813.zh_abstract: 利用盖洛普劳动力小组的新数据，我们表明，工作场所人工智能采用中明显的党派分歧在很大程度上是教育和职业分类的产物，而非技术采用中的意识形态差异。虽然民主党人报告频繁使用人工智能的比例始终高于共和党人——2026年第一季度为30.1%对25%——并且在更广泛的工作活动中展现出更深层次的任务级整合，但一旦我们控制了教育程度，这一原始差距就会缩小到统计上不显著，并且在包含职业和行业固定效应的完全饱和模型中，其符号会发生逆转。民主党人在更易受人工智能影响的职业和更支持人工智能的组织环境中工作，但这些差异反映的是人们的工作地点和所拥有的技能，而非政治身份本身。抵制这种构成性解释的一个维度是感知的工作替代风险：党派差异在2025年之前统计上无法区分，但到2026年第一季度出现了4.2个百分点的差距，这表明信念分歧可能开始超过解释行为差异的结构性因素。从这个意义上说，“人工智能的政治学”更应被理解为人力资本和职业结构的政治地理学，而非技术采用中的意识形态分歧。

34812.title: Early Learning Across Decades: Advances in Measuring Head Start Effectiveness
34812.zh_title: 跨越数十年的早期学习：衡量“开端计划”有效性的进展
34812.abstract: The Head Start program, launched in 1965 and targeted to children from disadvantaged backgrounds, remains the largest early childhood care and education (ECE) program in the United States and the only one deployed at the federal level. As such, the Head Start literature spans several decades and now allows for synthesis of findings from different contexts, time periods, and research designs. This paper provides a comprehensive assessment of the rigorous evidence measuring Head Start’s effects on children, their families, and society. The focus is on how (1) the contrast between program and counterfactual conditions, (2) takeup of the program among eligible populations, and (3) treatment–effect heterogeneity inform interpretation and applicability of key findings. The paper presents implications of the evidence for the modern-day Head Start program and an adjacent, policy-relevant research agenda.
34812.zh_abstract: “开端计划”始于1965年，针对来自弱势背景的儿童，至今仍是美国最大的早期儿童保育和教育项目，也是唯一一个在联邦层面部署的项目。因此，关于“开端计划”的文献跨越了数十年，现在可以综合来自不同背景、时期和研究设计的发现。本文对衡量“开端计划”对儿童、家庭和社会影响的严谨证据进行了全面评估。重点在于：(1) 项目条件与反事实条件之间的对比，(2) 合格人群对该项目的参与度，以及 (3) 处理效应异质性如何影响对关键发现的解读和适用性。本文提出了这些证据对现代“开端计划”项目以及一项相关的、具有政策意义的研究议程的启示。

34811.title: Field Experiments in the Science of Science: Lessons from Peer Review and the Evaluation of New Knowledge
34811.zh_title: 科学学中的实地实验：来自同行评审和新知识评估的教训
34811.abstract: Scientific evaluation and peer review govern the allocation of resources and certification of knowledge in science, yet have been subjected to limited causal investigation. This chapter synthesizes randomized experiments embedded in live peer-evaluation systems at journals, conferences, and funding agencies, restricting attention to published studies. I organize this evidence using a Q–A–R–S framework that decomposes peer review into attributes of submissions (Q), authors (A), reviewers (R), and evaluation systems (S), and interpret outcomes through a view of the core problem of scientific evaluation as assessing new knowledge using the existing stock of knowledge.
34811.zh_abstract: 科学评估和同行评审支配着科学资源的分配和知识的认证，然而对其进行的因果研究却很有限。本章综合了嵌入在期刊、会议和资助机构的实时同行评估系统中的随机实验，仅关注已发表的研究。我使用一个Q-A-R-S框架来组织这些证据，该框架将同行评审分解为投稿的属性（Q）、作者（A）、评审人（R）和评估系统（S），并通过一个视角来解释结果，该视角将科学评估的核心问题视为利用现有知识存量来评估新知识。
34811.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：A14, C93, D02, D83, G18, I23, O31, O38

34810.title: Searching for Fish in Trees (緣木求魚)? Economic Development when Context Matters
34810.zh_title: 缘木求鱼？当背景重要时的经济发展
34810.authors: Jacob Moscona, Nathan Nunn, James A. Robinson
34810.abstract: In this chapter, we develop a framework for analyzing the determinants of economic development and their implications for policy. We distinguish between classical determinants—such as inputs into education and health, access to credit, and geography—and non-classical determinants—including cultural values, social norms, beliefs, identity, and social organization. We classify these determinants along two policy-relevant dimensions: whether they can be clearly ranked in terms of their contribution to development (vertical versus horizontal) and whether they can be directly altered through policy intervention (manipulable versus non-manipulable).We show that even for classical determinants, policy impacts are often hard to predict and are mediated by local social and cultural context. These issues are more pronounced for non-classical determinants, which are more complicated to change through policy intervention and more difficult to rank in welfare terms. In some cases, traits commonly viewed as obstacles to development may be well-adapted to local conditions or even supportive of economic performance, a possibility we refer to as “reverse vertical.” Building on Hirschman’s (1967) distinction between trait-making and trait-taking policymaking, we argue that interventions that attempt to directly transform non-classical determinants often rest on fragile assumptions about ranking and manipulability and risk generating unintended or adverse effects. By contrast, many of the most successful development episodes of the past several decades relied on policies that took existing social and cultural traits as given and designed institutions, technologies, and incentives that worked within those contexts rather than attempting to overturn them.
34810.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们开发了一个分析经济发展决定因素及其政策含义的框架。我们区分了经典决定因素——如教育和健康投入、信贷获取和地理——与非经典决定因素——包括文化价值观、社会规范、信念、身份和社会组织。我们沿着两个与政策相关的维度对这些决定因素进行分类：它们是否可以根据对发展的贡献进行明确排序（纵向与横向），以及它们是否可以通过政策干预直接改变（可操纵与不可操纵）。我们表明，即使对于经典决定因素，政策影响也常常难以预测，并受到当地社会和文化背景的调节。这些问题对于非经典决定因素更为突出，因为通过政策干预改变它们更为复杂，并且在福利方面更难排序。在某些情况下，通常被视为发展障碍的特征可能很好地适应了当地条件，甚至支持经济表现，我们将这种可能性称为“反向纵向”。基于Hirschman（1967）对特质塑造型和特质接受型政策制定的区分，我们认为，试图直接改变非经典决定因素的干预措施通常建立在关于排序和可操纵性的脆弱假设之上，并有可能产生意想不到或不利的影响。相比之下，过去几十年中许多最成功的发展案例依赖于那些将现有社会和文化特征视为既定条件，并设计在这些背景下运作而非试图颠覆它们的制度、技术和激励措施的政策。

34809.title: Progress or Backsliding? Changes in the Gender Wage Gap for Business Professionals
34809.zh_title: 进步还是倒退？商业专业人士性别工资差距的变化
34809.authors: Ann Harrison, Laura J. Kray, Noor Sethi
34809.abstract: In the United States, much of the gap in earnings between men and women is due to the persistent gap for high wage earners. This paper explores changes in the gender wage gap for MBAs graduating from a large public university over 30 years. We document large gender wage gaps on average, which grow in the course of men’s and women’s careers. Comparing graduates at identical career stages across time periods to address composition concerns, we show that the raw gender wage gap has shrunk by 33 to 50 percent over the last two decades. Additionally, the temporal pattern of the gap has fundamentally shifted: while gaps only emerged over time in earlier decades, significant gaps now emerge immediately. Convergence in labor supply factors, particularly hours worked, explains much of the narrowing gap, alongside shifts in industry composition. However, unexplained wage gaps persist for recent graduates from the very start of their careers, suggesting different underlying mechanisms across cohorts. These findings highlight both progress in gender wage equity among business professionals and concerning patterns that emerge earlier in careers than in previous decades.
34809.zh_abstract: 在美国，男性和女性之间收入差距的很大一部分源于高收入者的持续差距。本文探讨了30年来从一所大型公立大学毕业的MBA学生的性别工资差距变化。我们记录了平均而言巨大的性别工资差距，这些差距在男性和女性的职业生涯中不断扩大。为了处理构成问题，我们比较了不同时期处于相同职业阶段的毕业生，结果显示，过去二十年中，原始的性别工资差距缩小了33%到50%。此外，差距的时间模式已发生根本性转变：虽然在早期几十年中差距仅随时间推移而出现，但现在显著的差距在毕业时立即出现。劳动力供给因素（特别是工作时间）的趋同，以及行业构成的转变，在很大程度上解释了差距的缩小。然而，对于近期毕业生而言，从他们职业生涯一开始就存在无法解释的工资差距，这表明不同群体之间存在不同的潜在机制。这些发现既突显了商业专业人士在性别工资公平方面取得的进展，也揭示了比以往几十年更早出现在职业生涯中的令人担忧的模式。

34808.title: AI Personality Extraction from Faces: Labor Market Implications
34808.zh_title: 从面部图像中提取AI人格：对劳动力市场的影响
34808.authors: Marius Guenzel, Shimon Kogan, Marina Niessner, Kelly Shue
34808.abstract: Human capital—encompassing cognitive skills and personality traits—is central for labor-market success, yet personality remains difficult to measure at scale. Leveraging advances in AI and comprehensive LinkedIn microdata, we extract the Big 5 personality traits from facial images of 96,000 MBA graduates, and demonstrate that this novel “Photo Big 5” predicts school rank, job matching, compensation, job transitions, and career advancement. The Photo Big 5 provides predictive power comparable to race, attractiveness, and educational background, and is only weakly correlated with cognitive measures such as test scores. We show that individuals systematically sort into occupations where their personality traits are valued and earn higher wages when traits align with occupational demands. While the scalability of the Photo Big 5 enables new academic insights into the role of personality in labor markets, its growing use in industry screening raises important ethical concerns regarding statistical discrimination and individual autonomy.
34808.zh_abstract: 人力资本——包括认知技能和人格特质——对于劳动力市场的成功至关重要，然而人格仍然难以大规模测量。利用人工智能的进步和全面的领英微观数据，我们从96,000名MBA毕业生的面部图像中提取了大五人格特质，并证明这种新颖的“照片大五”可以预测学校排名、工作匹配、薪酬、工作转换和职业晋升。照片大五提供的预测能力与种族、吸引力和教育背景相当，并且与考试成绩等认知测量指标仅弱相关。我们表明，个体会系统地选择进入其人格特质受到重视的职业，并且当特质与职业需求相符时，他们会获得更高的工资。虽然照片大五的可扩展性为理解人格在劳动力市场中的作用带来了新的学术见解，但其在行业筛选中的日益使用引发了关于统计歧视和个人自主权的重要伦理问题。

34807.title: AI, Opinion Ecosystems, and Finance
34807.zh_title: 人工智能、观点生态与金融
34807.authors: David Hirshleifer, Lin Peng, Qiguang Wang, Weichen Zhang, Xiaoyan Zhang
34807.abstract: Generative AI use for content generation is associated with divergent outcomes on different financial social media platforms: indications of reasoning enhancement on Seeking Alpha, and of belief distortions on WallStreetBets. On Seeking Alpha, adoption is associated with information frictions. AI-assisted postings tilt toward analysis/credibility, and their sentiment positively predicts future returns. Use of AI is associated with more informative retail order flow and lower bid-ask spreads. In contrast, AI adoption on WallStreetBets follows surges in retail buying, and AI-assisted content is associated with emotionality and sentiment contagion. Such content precedes higher trading volume, greater volatility, and more lottery-like return distributions.
34807.zh_abstract: 生成式人工智能用于内容生成与不同金融社交媒体平台上的不同结果相关：在Seeking Alpha上表现为推理能力增强的迹象，在WallStreetBets上则表现为信念扭曲的迹象。在Seeking Alpha上，采用人工智能与信息摩擦相关。人工智能辅助的帖子倾向于分析和可信度，其情绪正向预测未来收益。使用人工智能与更具信息量的散户订单流和更低的买卖价差相关。相比之下，WallStreetBets上的人工智能采用紧随散户买入激增之后，而人工智能辅助的内容则与情绪化和情绪传染相关。此类内容先于更高的交易量、更大的波动性和更类似彩票的收益分布出现。
34807.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D02, D82, D83, D84, D9, G11, G12, G14, G2, G4, G5, K22, O33

34806.title: Heaven or Earth? The Evolving Role of Global Shocks for Domestic Monetary Policy
34806.zh_title: 天堂还是人间？全球冲击对国内货币政策不断演变的作用
34806.authors: Kristin Forbes, Jongrim Ha, M. Ayhan Kose
34806.abstract: Business cycles are increasingly driven by global shocks, rather than the domestic demand shocks prominent in earlier decades, posing challenges for central banks seeking to meet domestic mandates and communicate their policy decisions. This paper analyzes the evolving influence and characteristics of global and domestic shocks in advanced economies from 1970-2024 using a new FAVAR model that decomposes movements in interest rates, inflation, and output growth into four global shocks (demand, supply, oil, and monetary policy) and three domestic shocks (demand, supply, and monetary policy). We find that the role of global shocks has increased sharply over time and that their characteristics differ from those of domestic shocks across multiple dimensions. Compared to domestic shocks, global shocks have a larger supply component, higher variance, more persistent effects on inflation, and are more asymmetric (contributing more to tightening than to easing phases of monetary policy). As global supply shocks have become more prominent, central banks have also been less willing to “look through” their effects on inflation than for comparable domestic shocks. The distinct characteristics and rising influence of global shocks—particularly global supply shocks—have significant implications for modeling monetary policy and designing central bank frameworks.
34806.zh_abstract: 商业周期越来越多地由全球冲击驱动，而非早期几十年中突出的国内需求冲击，这给寻求实现国内任务并传达其政策决定的中央银行带来了挑战。本文使用一个新的FAVAR模型分析了1970年至2024年发达经济体中全球和国内冲击不断演变的影响和特征，该模型将利率、通胀和产出增长的变动分解为四种全球冲击（需求、供给、石油和货币政策）和三种国内冲击（需求、供给和货币政策）。我们发现，全球冲击的作用随着时间的推移急剧增加，并且其特征在多个维度上与国内冲击不同。与国内冲击相比，全球冲击具有更大的供给成分、更高的方差、对通胀更持久的影响，并且更加不对称（对货币政策的紧缩阶段贡献大于宽松阶段）。随着全球供给冲击变得更加突出，中央银行也不太愿意“看穿”它们对通胀的影响，而相比之下对类似的国内冲击则更愿意。全球冲击——特别是全球供给冲击——的独特特征和日益增长的影响力，对货币政策建模和中央银行框架设计具有重要影响。
34806.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E32, E52, F41, F42, F44, F47, F62, G15, Q43

34805.title: School Vaping Bans and Youth E-Cigarette Use
34805.zh_title: 学校电子烟禁令与青少年电子烟使用
34805.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Jooyoung Kim, Nikolaos Prodromidis, Joseph J. Sabia
34805.abstract: With the goal of curbing electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) use among youths, 40 states and the District of Columbia have adopted restrictions on nicotine vaping at elementary and secondary (K-12) schools. This study is the first to estimate the effect of K-12 school vaping restrictions (SVRs) on ENDS use among youth. Using data from several nationally representative data sources and a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find little evidence that school indoor vaping restrictions reduce youth ENDS use. With 95% confidence, we can rule out SVR-induced youth vaping declines of more than 3.5%. Descriptive evidence suggests that students may respond to SVRs by substituting to smaller vaping devices and vaping in school locations that are less easily detectable by school employees (e.g., bathrooms and locker rooms). In contrast, we find that comprehensive vaping restrictions covering school campuses, workplaces, restaurants, and drinking establishments are associated with a 1.5-2.6 percentage-point reduction in teen nicotine vaping. This result is concentrated on the initiation margin of use and is consistent with the hypothesis that broader place-based restrictions increase the costs of youth ENDS use.
34805.zh_abstract: 为了遏制青少年使用电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS），40个州和哥伦比亚特区已对中小学（K-12）的尼古丁电子烟实施了限制。本研究首次估算了K-12学校电子烟限制（SVRs）对青少年ENDS使用的影响。利用多个全国代表性数据源的数据和广义双重差分方法，我们几乎没有发现学校室内电子烟限制能减少青少年ENDS使用的证据。在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除SVR导致青少年电子烟使用率下降超过3.5%的可能性。描述性证据表明，学生可能会通过改用更小的电子烟设备以及在校园内不易被教职工察觉的地点（如卫生间和更衣室）吸电子烟来应对SVR。相比之下，我们发现涵盖校园、工作场所、餐厅和饮酒场所的全面电子烟限制与青少年尼古丁电子烟使用率降低1.5至2.6个百分点相关。这一结果集中在使用的起始边际上，并且与更广泛的地域限制增加了青少年ENDS使用成本的假设一致。
34805.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I0, I12, I18

34804.title: Aggregate Employment and the Rise of Services across Time and Countries
34804.zh_title: 总就业与服务业崛起：跨时间与跨国研究
34804.abstract: We study the sectoral reallocation of employment over time and across countries, with a focus on the rise of services. We document substantial changes in the ratio of aggregate employment to working-age population across countries that are not systematically related to productivity growth or income levels, yet tightly linked to the rise in services employment. We assess the quantitative contribution of changes in aggregate employment to the rise of services using an otherwise standard model of sectoral reallocation calibrated to time-series for the United States. The calibrated model implies a high elasticity of changes in aggregate employment to services: a one percentage point change in aggregate employment generates on average a 0.7 percentage point change in services employment. The implication is that actual changes in aggregate employment account for one-third of the rise in services, on average across countries, and up to one-half in countries with sustained employment increases.
34804.zh_abstract: 我们研究了就业在部门间的重新配置，重点关注服务业的崛起，涵盖时间序列和跨国比较。我们记录了各国总就业与劳动年龄人口比率发生的显著变化，这些变化与生产率增长或收入水平并无系统性关联，但与服务业就业的增长紧密相连。我们使用一个校准至美国时间序列的标准部门重新配置模型，评估了总就业变化对服务业崛起的定量贡献。校准后的模型显示，总就业变化对服务业具有高弹性：总就业每变化一个百分点，平均会引致服务业就业变化0.7个百分点。这意味着，平均而言，在各国中，总就业的实际变化解释了服务业增长的三分之一；在就业持续增长的国家，这一比例高达二分之一。

34803.title: Inferring Prices from Quantities
34803.authors: David Argente, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Munseob Lee
34803.abstract: Measuring aggregate inflation is subject to two opposing biases: unobserved quality and variety growth, and the use of incorrect weights when new varieties are misclassified. We show that it is possible to measure an aggregate price index free of these biases when we have a subset of products where these two errors average to zero. This procedure does not require us to distinguish new from existing goods, measure quality attributes directly, or classify new varieties into the appropriate category. We implement this approach using BEA data from 1959 to 2019, approximating the official PCE price index with a CES aggregate of BEA prices at the product level. Our estimate of the inflation rate exceeds the CES aggregate of BEA prices by 0.3 to 1.0 percentage points per year on average. The aggregate bias was close to zero prior to the BLS introducing hedonic adjustments, which suggests that only adjusting for quality bias can lead to an underestimation of overall inflation, particularly in quality-adjusted categories.
34803.zh_abstract: 衡量总体通胀面临两种相反的偏差：未观测到的质量和品种增长，以及当新品种被错误分类时使用错误权重。我们证明，当我们拥有一个子集的产品，其中这两种误差平均为零时，可以衡量一个无偏的总体价格指数。此过程无需我们区分新旧商品、直接测量质量属性或将新品种归入适当类别。我们使用1959年至2019年的BEA数据实施此方法，用产品层面BEA价格的CES加总来近似官方PCE价格指数。我们对通胀率的估计平均每年比BEA价格的CES加总高出0.3至1.0个百分点。在BLS引入特征价格调整之前，总体偏差接近于零，这表明仅调整质量偏差可能导致对总体通胀的低估，尤其是在经过质量调整的类别中。
34803.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PR；JEL：D11, D12, E01, E31

34802.title: Competition and Fraud in Health Care
34802.zh_title: 医疗保健领域的竞争与欺诈
34802.authors: Renuka M. Diwan, Paul J. Eliason, Riley League, Jetson Leder-Luis, Ryan C. McDevitt, James W. Roberts
34802.abstract: Governments rely on private firms to provide public goods and services. Although competition among these firms reduces prices and the costs of procurement, it has an ambiguous effect on fraud: competition can both dissipate the rents that attracted fraudulent firms to the market while at the same time reducing margins to the point where legitimate firms no longer remain viable. We study this tradeoff in the government’s procurement of durable medical equipment. Following Medicare’s switch from regulated prices to competitive bidding, we find that fraudulent firms’ cost advantage allowed them to gain market share as legitimate firms exited the market.
34802.zh_abstract: 政府依赖私营企业提供公共产品和服务。尽管这些企业之间的竞争降低了价格和采购成本，但它对欺诈的影响却不明确：竞争既可以消散吸引欺诈企业进入市场的租金，同时也会将利润率降低到合法企业不再能维持生存的地步。我们在政府对耐用医疗设备的采购中研究了这种权衡。在Medicare从管制价格转向竞争性招标后，我们发现欺诈企业的成本优势使它们能够在合法企业退出市场时获得市场份额。
34802.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D22, D73, H41, I18, K42

34801.title: Loan-funded Loans: Equity-like Liabilities inside Bank Holding Companies
34801.zh_title: 贷款资助的贷款：银行控股公司内部类似股权的负债
34801.authors: Jennie Bai, Murillo Campello, Pradeep Muthukrishnan
34801.abstract: Leveraging regulatory data on fund flows within bank holding companies (BHCs), we characterize internal loans as a critical funding source for commercial banks. Although recorded as bank liabilities, parent-to-bank internal loans function as contingent support that resembles capital. We show that internal-loan funded banks do not hoard liquidity; instead, they originate larger and longer-maturity loans at lower spreads, initiate more relationships with marginal borrowers, and retain larger shares in syndicated deals. Internal-loan-funded lending is followed by higher short-run profits but higher future nonperforming loan ratios. We further show that organizational structure shapes internal lending: in BHCs with both bank and nonbank operations, nonbank affiliates crowd out internal lending to banks and discipline banks’ use of internal funds, and these BHCs exhibit higher overall performance. To identify our tests, we exploit the passage of the Gramm–Leach–Bliley Act and the announcement of the Basel III Accord, using instrumental variables and discontinuity-design approaches. Our findings highlight an equity-like internal debt channel that shapes monetary policy transmission, risk-taking, and the role of organizational structure in banking.
34801.zh_abstract: 利用银行控股公司（BHCs）内部资金流的监管数据，我们将内部贷款描述为商业银行的关键资金来源。尽管在账面上记为银行负债，但母公司向银行的内部贷款起着类似于资本的或有支持作用。我们表明，由内部贷款提供资金的银行不会囤积流动性；相反，它们以更低的利差发放更大规模和更长期限的贷款，与边际借款人建立更多关系，并在银团贷款中保留更大份额。由内部贷款资助的贷款随后带来更高的短期利润，但也会带来更高的未来不良贷款率。我们进一步表明，组织结构塑造了内部贷款：在同时拥有银行和非银行运营的BHCs中，非银行附属机构挤出了对银行的内部贷款，并约束了银行对内部资金的使用，这些BHCs表现出更高的整体绩效。为了识别我们的检验，我们利用了《格雷姆-里奇-比利雷法案》的通过和《巴塞尔协议III》的宣布，采用工具变量和断点回归设计方法。我们的发现突出了一个类似股权的内部债务渠道，该渠道塑造了货币政策传导、风险承担以及组织结构在银行业中的作用。

34800.title: Class Mobility in the Era of Rising Inequality: A Synthetic Dynasty Analysis
34800.zh_title: 不平等加剧时代的阶级流动性：一项合成王朝分析
34800.authors: Geoffrey Wodtke, Weiqi Wang, Kristina Butaeva, Steven N. Durlauf
34800.abstract: This paper studies contemporary trends in class mobility using a new approach based on the “synthetic dynasties” represented in Markov chains. This approach yields several novel measures of movement and memory, which respectively capture how class positions differ from one generation to the next and how the influence of class origins dissipates across generations. Applying these methods to data from the U.S., we find that overall levels of movement and memory have remained largely stable across cohorts born between 1945 and 1990. This stability, however, masks offsetting class-specific trends. Among those from the upper and lower classes, movement has declined and memory has increased. In contrast, among the middle classes, movement has risen and memory has weakened.
34800.zh_abstract: 本文使用一种基于马尔可夫链所代表的“合成王朝”的新方法，研究当代阶级流动性的趋势。这种方法产生了几个关于流动性和记忆的新度量，分别捕捉了阶级地位在代际间的差异程度以及阶级出身的影响在代际间消散的速度。将这些方法应用于美国数据，我们发现，在1945年至1990年间出生的队列中，流动性和记忆的总体水平基本保持稳定。然而，这种稳定性掩盖了相互抵消的特定阶级趋势。在上层和下层阶级中，流动性下降，记忆增强。相比之下，在中产阶级中，流动性上升，记忆减弱。
34800.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D30, H0, J01

34853.title: Bank Failures: The Roles of Solvency and Liquidity
34853.zh_title: 银行倒闭：偿付能力与流动性的作用
34853.authors: Sergio A. Correia, Stephan Luck, Emil Verner
34853.abstract: Bank failures can stem from runs on otherwise solvent banks or from losses that render banks insolvent, regardless of withdrawals. Disentangling the relative importance of liquidity and solvency in explaining bank failures is central to understanding financial crises and designing effective financial stability policies. This paper reviews evidence on the causes of bank failures. Bank failures---both with and without runs---are almost always related to poor fundamentals. Low recovery rates in failure suggest that most failed banks that experienced runs were likely fundamentally insolvent. Examiners' postmortem assessments also emphasize the primacy of poor asset quality and solvency problems. Before deposit insurance, runs commonly triggered the failure of insolvent banks. However, runs rarely caused the failure of strong banks, as such runs were typically resolved through other mechanisms, including interbank cooperation, equity injections, public signals of strength, or suspension of convertibility. We discuss the policy implications of these findings and outline directions for future research.
34853.zh_abstract: 银行倒闭可能源于对原本有偿付能力的银行的挤兑，也可能源于导致银行资不抵债的损失（无论是否存在提款）。厘清流动性和偿付能力在解释银行倒闭中的相对重要性，对于理解金融危机和设计有效的金融稳定政策至关重要。本文回顾了关于银行倒闭原因的证据。银行倒闭——无论是否伴随挤兑——几乎总是与基本面不佳有关。倒闭中的低回收率表明，大多数经历挤兑的倒闭银行可能从根本上已经资不抵债。检查人员的死后评估也强调了不良资产质量和偿付能力问题的首要性。在存款保险制度建立之前，挤兑通常会引发资不抵债银行的倒闭。然而，挤兑很少导致实力雄厚银行的倒闭，因为此类挤兑通常通过其他机制得到解决，包括银行间合作、注资、释放实力强劲的公开信号或暂停兑换。我们讨论了这些发现的政策含义，并概述了未来研究的方向。
34853.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ME；JEL：G01, G2, G21, N20, N21

34852.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of Tariffs: Evidence From U.S. Historical Data
34852.zh_title: 关税的宏观经济效应：来自美国历史数据的证据
34852.authors: Tamar den Besten, Diego R. Känzig
34852.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of tariff policy using U.S. historical data from 1840–2024. We construct a narrative series of plausibly exogenous tariff changes – based on major legislative actions, multilateral negotiations, and temporary surcharges – and use it as an instrument to identify a structural tariff shock. Tariff increases are contractionary: imports fall sharply, exports decline with a lag, and output and manufacturing activity drop persistently. The shock transmits through both supply and demand channels. Prices rise in the full sample but fall post-World War II, a pattern consistent with changes in the monetary policy response and with stronger international retaliation and reciprocity in the modern trade regime.
34852.zh_abstract: 我们利用1840年至2024年的美国历史数据研究关税政策的宏观经济效应。我们构建了一个基于叙事的、看似外生的关税变化序列——基于重大立法行动、多边谈判和临时附加费——并将其用作工具变量来识别结构性关税冲击。提高关税是紧缩性的：进口急剧下降，出口滞后下降，产出和制造业活动持续下降。该冲击通过供给和需求两个渠道传导。在全样本中价格上涨，但在二战后下降，这一模式与货币政策反应的变化以及现代贸易体制中更强的国际报复和互惠性相一致。
34852.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E30, F13, F14, F41, H20

34851.title: Does Generative AI Narrow Education-Based Productivity Gaps? Evidence from a Randomized Experiment
34851.zh_title: 生成式人工智能是否会缩小基于教育的生产率差距？来自随机实验的证据
34851.authors: Guillermo Cruces, Diego Fernández Meijide, Sebastian Galiani, Ramiro H. Gálvez, María Lombardi
34851.abstract: Does generative artificial intelligence (AI) reinforce or reduce productivity differences across workers? Existing evidence largely studies AI within firms and occupations, where organizational selection compresses educational heterogeneity, leaving unclear whether AI narrows productivity gaps across individuals with different levels of education. A related question is whether the productivity gains from AI reflect productive use of the tool or mere delegation, fading once AI is unavailable, and whether the answer differs across education groups. We address both questions using a randomized online experiment outside firms, in which 1,174 adults aged 25–45 complete an incentivized, workplace style business problem-solving task with or without a generative-AI assistant, followed by a non-AI-assisted follow-up module. AI increases performance for all participants, with substantially larger gains for lower-education individuals. In the control group without AI, higher-education participants outperform lower-education participants by 0.548 standard deviations; with AI, this gap falls to 0.139 standard deviations, closing about three-quarters of the initial gap. Chat-log measures explain both why this gap narrows and why it does not disappear: lower-education participants successfully obtain substantial assistance from AI, while higher-education participants use the tool somewhat more effectively across several margins. The follow-up results show that these gains are not purely driven by delegation; treated participants do not perform worse than controls once AI is removed, and lower-education participants retain part of their gain, although a sizable education gap re-emerges. Consistent with this interpretation, intensive use of the assistant produces strong task performance regardless of how much time and effort participants devote themselves, but follow-up performance is substantially higher only when intensive AI use is combined with sustained effort on the task. We interpret these findings as evidence that generative AI narrows effective productivity differences in task execution while underlying human-capital differences continue to shape unassisted performance and effective use of the tool.
34851.zh_abstract: 生成式人工智能（AI）是强化还是缩小了工人之间的生产率差异？现有证据主要研究企业内部和职业内部的AI，在这些情境中，组织选择压缩了教育异质性，因此尚不清楚AI是否会缩小不同教育水平个体之间的生产率差距。一个相关的问题是，AI带来的生产率提升是反映了对该工具的有效利用，还是仅仅是委托（delegation），一旦AI不可用，这种提升就会消失，以及不同教育群体的答案是否不同。我们通过在企业外部进行的一项随机在线实验来探讨这两个问题，实验中1174名25-45岁的成年人在有或没有生成式AI助手的情况下完成一项有激励的、工作场所风格的商业问题解决任务，随后进行一个无AI辅助的后续模块。AI提高了所有参与者的绩效，且教育程度较低的个体获得的收益要大得多。在没有AI的对照组中，高教育程度参与者的表现比低教育程度参与者高出0.548个标准差；有了AI，这一差距缩小到0.139个标准差，缩小了约四分之三的初始差距。聊天记录指标解释了为什么这一差距会缩小以及为什么没有消失：低教育程度参与者成功地从AI获得了大量帮助，而高教育程度参与者在多个方面更有效地使用了该工具。后续结果显示，这些收益并非纯粹由委托驱动；一旦移除AI，受试组参与者的表现并不比对照组差，并且低教育程度参与者保留了部分收益，尽管相当大的教育差距重新出现。与这种解释一致的是，无论参与者自己投入多少时间和精力，密集使用助手都能产生强大的任务绩效，但只有当密集使用AI与对任务的持续努力相结合时，后续绩效才会显著提高。我们将这些发现解释为证据，表明生成式AI缩小了任务执行中的有效生产率差异，而潜在的人力资本差异继续塑造着无辅助绩效和对工具的有效使用。

34847.title: The Differential Impacts of Critical Mineral Prices and Oil Prices on the Economy
34847.zh_title: 关键矿产价格和石油价格对经济的差异化影响
34847.authors: Adrien Concordel, Phuong Ho, Christopher R. Knittel
34847.abstract: This paper compares the impacts of critical mineral price and oil price on an economy in a unified neoclassical growth model. Unlike oil price shocks, which affect the cost of utilizing existing capital (e.g., cars), critical mineral price shocks influence the cost of creating new capital (e.g., electric vehicles) without altering the cost of existing capital. We find that both types of shocks ultimately reduce output and welfare. However, oil-price increases are systematically more contractionary for the economy. Mineral-price increases generate comparatively larger adjustments in investment, capital, and external borrowing but smaller and more gradual losses in output and welfare, and in capital-rich economies can slightly raise long-run employment. These results imply that oil-price shocks remain the more serious threat to aggregate activity and welfare, whereas mineral-price shocks call for policies that smooth investment and external-balance-sheet adjustment (e.g., macroprudential tools and precautionary reserves or fiscal buffers).
34847.zh_abstract: 本文在一个统一的新古典增长模型中比较了关键矿产价格和石油价格对经济的影响。与影响现有资本（如汽车）使用成本的石油价格冲击不同，关键矿产价格冲击影响新资本（如电动汽车）的创造成本，而不改变现有资本的成本。我们发现，两种类型的冲击最终都会减少产出和福利。然而，石油价格上涨对经济的紧缩效应系统性更强。矿产价格上涨导致投资、资本和外部借贷出现相对较大的调整，但产出和福利的损失更小、更渐进，并且在资本充裕的经济体中可能略微提高长期就业。这些结果表明，石油价格冲击仍然是对总体活动和福利更严重的威胁，而矿产价格冲击则需要采取能够平滑投资和外部资产负债表调整的政策（例如，宏观审慎工具以及预防性储备或财政缓冲）。
34847.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, IFM；JEL：E22, E32, F41, Q41, Q43

34846.title: Bidder Pools in Mergers and Acquisitions
34846.authors: Bruce I. Carlin, Tingting Liu, Micah S. Officer, Agathe Pernoud, Danni Tu
34846.abstract: Allocation mechanisms in M&A deals are complex, but a main feature is that a target board controls who to invite to the sale. In a theoretical model, we show that it is optimal for the target to invite fewer potential acquirers when they are more homogeneous (i.e., when their values for the target are more correlated). Furthermore, greater correlation (and hence a smaller optimal bidder pool) yields the target a higher surplus from the sale (i.e., higher premium). We test the model empirically and show that M&A deals with smaller bidder pools are associated with higher target returns. This is not a result of synergies in the deals: the target's share of the surplus is simply higher in deals with smaller bidder pools. Finally, we show that cash deals are associated with larger, whereas stock deals have smaller, pools of bidders.
34846.zh_abstract: 并购交易中的分配机制很复杂，但一个主要特征是目标公司董事会控制着邀请谁参与出售。在一个理论模型中，我们表明，当潜在收购方更加同质化时（即他们对目标公司的估值相关性更高），目标公司邀请更少的潜在收购方是最优的。此外，更高的相关性（以及因此更小的最优竞标者池）使得目标公司从出售中获得更高的剩余（即更高的溢价）。我们对该模型进行了实证检验，并表明竞标者池较小的并购交易与更高的目标公司回报相关。这并非交易协同效应的结果：在竞标者池较小的交易中，目标公司获得的剩余份额只是更高。最后，我们表明，现金交易与更大的竞标者池相关，而股票交易则与更小的竞标者池相关。

34845.title: Is Teacher Effectiveness Fully Portable? Evidence from the Random Assignment of Transfer Incentives
34845.zh_title: 教师效能是否完全可移植？来自调动激励随机分配的证据
34845.authors: Matthew A. Kraft, John P. Papay, Jessalynn K. James, Manuel Monti-Nussbaum
34845.abstract: We examine how performance changes when teachers transfer across very different school contexts. The Talent Transfer Initiative program created a rare natural experiment to study such transfers by randomly assigning low-achieving schools the ability to offer high-performing teachers at higher-achieving schools a $\$20,000$ transfer stipend. Forecast tests show that these high-performing teachers’ prior value added is only moderately predictive of their effectiveness in low-achieving schools. Using a difference-in-differences framework, we estimate that incentivized-transfer teachers’ value added dropped by 0.12 student standard deviations. This decline appears to be driven by lower match quality, negative indirect school effects, and the loss of student-specific human capital.
34845.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当教师在不同学校环境之间调动时，其绩效如何变化。人才转移倡议项目通过随机分配低成就学校向高成就学校的高绩效教师提供2万美元调动津贴的能力，创造了一个罕见的自然实验来研究此类调动。预测检验显示，这些高绩效教师先前的增值分数仅能适度预测他们在低成就学校的有效性。使用双重差分框架，我们估计受激励调动的教师的增值分数下降了0.12个学生标准差。这种下降似乎是由较低的匹配质量、负面的间接学校效应以及学生特定人力资本的损失所驱动的。

34844.title: Liquidity Flows to Bank-Affiliated Broker Dealers: Insights from Volumes and Prices
34844.zh_title: 流向银行附属经纪交易商的流动性：来自交易量和价格的洞见
34844.authors: Jennie Bai, Erik Bostrom, Sebastian Infante, Victoria Ivashina
34844.abstract: Using confidential transaction-level data on overnight tri-party Treasury repo from 2018–2025, we study liquidity flows within bank holding companies (BHCs) between primary dealers and affiliated entities. Affiliates, especially depository institutions with abundant reserves, provide a large share of dealers’ repo funding, yet affiliated repo borrowing is systematically more expensive: dealers pay an affiliation premium of about 4–5 bps relative to otherwise comparable unaffiliated trades, even after controlling for trade characteristics and market conditions. We interpret this premium as an internal transfer price. Because consolidated leverage regulation nets intra-BHC positions and lowers the marginal balance sheet cost of funding moved within the group, affiliated trades generate a regulatory "rent" that is shared between the dealer and the affiliate. Consistent with this mechanism, the premium widens when dealer balance sheet constraints are tighter, compresses sharply during a temporary leverage regulation exemption for reserves and Treasuries, and reappears after reinstatement. Finally, we estimate the pass-through of this internal liquidity channel to the broader financial system.
34844.zh_abstract: 利用2018年至2025年间隔夜三方国债回购的机密交易层面数据，我们研究了银行控股公司内部一级交易商与附属实体之间的流动性流动。附属机构，尤其是拥有充足储备的存款机构，提供了交易商回购融资的很大一部分，然而附属回购借款系统性地更为昂贵：与否则可比的非附属交易相比，交易商需支付约4-5个基点的附属溢价，即使在控制了交易特征和市场条件之后也是如此。我们将此溢价解释为一种内部转移价格。由于合并杠杆监管会抵消银行控股公司内部头寸并降低集团内资金流动的边际资产负债表成本，附属交易产生了一种监管“租金”，由交易商和附属机构共享。与该机制一致，当交易商资产负债表约束更紧时，溢价扩大；在针对储备和国债的临时杠杆监管豁免期间，溢价急剧压缩；并在豁免恢复后重新出现。最后，我们估计了这一内部流动性渠道向更广泛金融体系的传导效应。

34843.title: How Do Workers Think About The Costs and Benefits of Freelance Work? New Evidence From a Survey Experiment
34843.zh_title: 工人如何看待自由职业的成本与收益？来自一项调查实验的新证据
34843.authors: Edward Freeland, Andrew Garin, Dmitri K. Koustas
34843.abstract: We examine how workers perceive the trade-offs of freelancing using a novel survey design that explores the nature of workers' perceptions of their own jobs and the implications of work arrangements for their take-home pay. We find that, across several alternative classifications of freelance work, workers in such arrangements make less per hour than traditional employees, but report having greater control of when, where, and how they work. We find that on average, self-employed workers spend an additional 5 to 8 percentage points of gross pay covering unreimbursed expenses relative to traditional employees. However, when asked about expectations of net pay in freelance and traditional employment jobs with the same gross pay, respondents who received no quantitative information expected net pay to be higher in freelance arrangements than in employment arrangements, on average. This pattern reversed among respondents who were randomly assigned to receive customized estimates of their expected total expense and tax burdens in each arrangement, who estimated that freelance arrangements would generate lower net lower earnings than employment arrangements (consistent with the estimates we provided to them). This suggests that workers may not be fully aware of the tax and expense burdens freelance workers are responsible for. Interestingly, we find similar results both for workers who are currently employees in their main job and those who are currently self-employed, suggesting that the low salience of the tax and expense burdens associated with freelance work are not merely driven by those with no self-employment experience.
34843.zh_abstract: 我们使用一种新颖的调查设计来研究工人如何看待自由职业的权衡，该设计探讨了工人对自身工作性质的看法以及工作安排对其实际收入的影响。我们发现，在几种不同的自由职业分类中，从事此类安排的工人每小时收入低于传统雇员，但报告称对其工作的时间、地点和方式拥有更大的控制权。我们发现，平均而言，自雇工人相对于传统雇员，需要将总收入的额外5到8个百分点用于支付未报销的费用。然而，当被问及对相同总收入下自由职业和传统雇佣工作净收入的预期时，未收到任何定量信息的受访者平均预期自由职业安排的净收入高于雇佣安排。在随机分配接收每种安排下预期总费用和税收负担定制估算的受访者中，这一模式发生了逆转，他们估计自由职业安排产生的净收入低于雇佣安排（与我们提供给他们的估算一致）。这表明工人可能并未完全意识到自由职业者需要承担的税收和费用负担。有趣的是，我们发现，对于目前主要工作是雇员和目前是自雇者的工人，结果相似，这表明与自由职业相关的税收和费用负担的低显著性并不仅仅是由那些没有自雇经验的人驱动的。

34842.title: Nonparametric Identification of Demand without Exogenous Product Characteristics
34842.zh_title: 无外生产品特征的需求非参数识别
34842.authors: Kirill Borusyak, Jiafeng Chen, Peter Hull, Lihua Lei
34842.abstract: We study identification of differentiated product demand from market-level data when product characteristics can be endogenous. Past work suggests nonparametric identification may be impossible: that is, in addition to standard price instruments, exogenous characteristic-based instruments are essentially necessary to identify sufficiently flexible demand models with standard index restrictions. We show, however, that price counterfactuals are nonparametrically identified using recentered instruments—which combine exogenous price instruments with possibly endogenous product characteristics—under a weaker index restriction and a new condition we term faithfulness. We argue that faithfulness, like the usual completeness condition for nonparametric instrumental variable identification, is best viewed as a technical requirement on the strength of identifying variation rather than a substantive economic or statistical restriction. We show the two conditions are closely related, though generally distinct. We conclude with several practical implications for the parametric estimation of demand counterfactuals.
34842.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当产品特征可能是内生时，利用市场层面数据对差异化产品需求的识别问题。过去的研究表明非参数识别可能是不可能的：也就是说，除了标准的价格工具变量外，外生的基于特征的工具有本质上是识别具有标准指数约束的足够灵活的需求模型所必需的。然而，我们证明，在更弱的指数约束和一个我们称之为忠实性的新条件下，使用重新中心化的工具变量——它将外生的价格工具变量与可能内生的产品特征相结合——价格反事实是可以非参数识别的。我们认为，忠实性，如同非参数工具变量识别的通常完备性条件一样，最好被视为关于识别变异强度的技术要求，而非实质性的经济或统计约束。我们展示了这两个条件密切相关，尽管通常是不同的。最后，我们得出了对需求反事实参数估计的几个实际启示。

34841.title: Classrooms as Workplaces: How Student Composition Affects Teacher Health
34841.zh_title: 作为工作场所的教室：学生构成如何影响教师健康
34841.authors: Krzysztof Karbownik, Helena Svaleryd, Jonas Vlachos, Xuemeng Wang
34841.abstract: Work-related burnout and stress-related sickness absence have become increasingly prevalent, but evidence on which workplace features shape workers’ mental health remains limited. Using population-level Swedish register data covering all lower- and upper-secondary teachers from 2006–2024, we show that schools serving more disadvantaged students exhibit substantially higher rates of sickness absence, particularly for stress-related diagnoses. Exploiting within-teacher variation across student cohorts, we separate sorting from exposure and find that a one standard deviation increase in student disadvantage raises overall and stress-related sick leave by 3.6% and 8.7%, respectively. Survey evidence indicates that these effects operate through classroom conditions rather than workload or organizational differences. The findings establish client composition as a distinct and policy-relevant determinant of worker health in contact-intensive occupations.
34841.zh_abstract: 与工作相关的倦怠和压力相关的病假变得越来越普遍，但关于哪些工作场所特征影响工人心理健康的证据仍然有限。利用覆盖2006年至2024年所有初中和高中教师的瑞典全人口登记数据，我们表明，服务于更多弱势学生的学校表现出显著更高的病假率，尤其是压力相关诊断。利用同一教师在不同学生群体间的变异，我们将分类效应与暴露效应分离，发现学生弱势程度每增加一个标准差，总体病假和压力相关病假分别增加3.6%和8.7%。调查证据表明，这些效应是通过课堂条件而非工作量或组织差异发挥作用的。研究结果确立了客户构成作为接触密集型职业中工人健康的一个独特且与政策相关的决定因素。

34840.title: The Silk Road of Ashes: Exposure to NAFTA and Adult Mortality
34840.zh_title: 灰烬丝绸之路：北美自由贸易协定暴露与成人死亡率
34840.abstract: The implementation of the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) in 1994 resulted in a great restructuring in industry composition in the US, with substantial heterogeneity across local areas. In this paper, we investigate the effects of NAFTA on the mortality rates of the working-age population. We implement event studies and difference-in-difference analyses to examine dynamic changes in mortality rates in different years relative to NAFTA and in areas with differential exposure to NAFTA. Comparing areas with high versus low trade exposure measures, we find a 2.1 percent rise in the mortality rate of those aged 25-55. A back-of-the-envelope calculation suggests a 7.3 percent rise in mortality for the treated population, who lost their job due to NAFTA. Further analyses using a wide range of alternative data sources suggest that reductions in income-employment, reductions in wealth, increases in disability, decreases in health insurance coverage, decreases in private health insurance, and a higher likelihood of reliance on presumably lower quality public insurance as candidate mechanisms.
34840.zh_abstract: 1994年北美自由贸易协定（NAFTA）的实施导致了美国产业构成的巨大重组，各地区之间存在显著异质性。在本文中，我们研究了NAFTA对劳动年龄人口死亡率的影响。我们实施了事件研究和双重差分分析，以考察相对于NAFTA不同年份以及NAFTA暴露程度不同的地区死亡率的动态变化。比较贸易暴露度高和低的地区，我们发现25-55岁人群的死亡率上升了2.1%。一项粗略计算表明，因NAFTA而失业的受处理人群死亡率上升了7.3%。利用一系列广泛的替代数据源进行的进一步分析表明，收入-就业减少、财富减少、残疾增加、健康保险覆盖率下降、私人健康保险减少以及依赖可能质量较低的公共保险的可能性增加是潜在的机制。

34839.title: Reconstruction following Destruction: Entrepreneurship in the Aftermath of a Natural Disaster
34839.zh_title: 毁灭后的重建：自然灾害后的小企业创业
34839.authors: Richard Lombardo, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Duncan Thomas
34839.abstract: Little is known about the impact on small-scale enterprises of a large negative shock that destroys assets and disrupts local markets. We document the short- and long-run impacts of the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami using longitudinal household survey data. We leverage topography-driven variation in exposure to the tsunami in coastal Aceh and North Sumatra, Indonesia. There are large short-run declines in business ownership, real profits, and real business assets among those exposed to the tsunami relative to comparison individuals who were not directly exposed. The gap in ownership rates disappears within two years in the non-agricultural sector but persists for 15 years in the agricultural sector. Profits and business assets of the exposed remain substantially lower through the long-term. Tsunami exposure led to increased short-duration transitions into and out of business ownership. Housing aid is linked to higher rates of non-agricultural business ownership and profits.
34839.zh_abstract: 关于大规模负面冲击（该冲击摧毁资产并扰乱当地市场）对小规模企业的影响，人们知之甚少。我们利用纵向家庭调查数据记录了2004年印度洋海啸的短期和长期影响。我们利用了印度尼西亚亚齐省和北苏门答腊省沿海地区地形驱动的海啸暴露差异。与未直接暴露的对照个体相比，暴露于海啸的个体在企业所有权、实际利润和实际商业资产方面出现了巨大的短期下降。非农业部门的所有权率差距在两年内消失，但在农业部门持续了15年。暴露者的利润和商业资产在长期内仍然显著较低。海啸暴露导致进入和退出企业所有权的短期转换增加。住房援助与非农业企业所有权和利润的提高有关。

34838.title: R&D Uncertainty and Cycles
34838.abstract: Investment in equipment and structures is one of the most cyclical components of GDP, a fact often associated with a negative response to heightened uncertainty in recessions. R&D investment, by contrast, is only mildly procyclical. We show that this difference could arise because of a positive response of R&D investment to uncertainty - promoting more research, development, and experimentation - a feature of most recessions but most notably during COVID. Both effects are distinct manifestations of real options, one in which costly reversibility delays investment, and the other in which investment enhances resolution of uncertainty.
34838.zh_abstract: 设备和建筑投资是GDP中最具周期性的组成部分之一，这一事实通常与经济衰退中不确定性加剧时的负面反应有关。相比之下，研发投资仅呈现温和的顺周期性。我们表明，这种差异可能源于研发投资对不确定性的正向反应——促进更多的研究、开发和实验——这是大多数经济衰退的特征，但在新冠疫情期间尤为显著。这两种效应都是实物期权的不同表现，一种情况下，高昂的可逆性成本延迟了投资；另一种情况下，投资加速了不确定性的消除。

34837.title: Non-Fungible Tokens as Investment
34837.zh_title: 作为投资的非同质化代币
34837.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Dong Huang, Milad Nozari
34837.abstract: NFTs provided an extraordinary real-time laboratory for bubble economics: returns were exceptionally right-skewed, illiquidity pervaded even the most active platforms, and a handful of trades drove aggregate performance. Investors extrapolating from realized returns without recognizing selection bias and survivorship faced a substantial risk of disappointment. As our data and simulations confirm, successful NFT investing during the bubble required an almost perfect confluence of timing, liquidity, and luck.
34837.zh_abstract: NFT为泡沫经济学提供了一个非凡的实时实验室：回报异常右偏，即使在最活跃的平台上流动性也普遍不足，少数交易驱动了整体表现。那些从已实现回报中进行推断、却未认识到选择偏差和幸存者偏差的投资者，面临着巨大的失望风险。正如我们的数据和模拟所证实的，在泡沫期间成功的NFT投资需要时机、流动性和运气几乎完美的结合。

34836.title: Firm Data on AI
34836.zh_title: 关于人工智能的企业数据
34836.authors: Ivan Yotzov, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Steven J. Davis, Kevin M. Foster, Aaron Jalca, Brent H. Meyer, Paul Mizen, Michael A. Navarrete, Pawel Smietanka, Gregory Thwaites, Ben Zhe Wang
34836.abstract: We survey nearly 6,000 senior business executives at US, UK, German, and Australian firms to develop new evidence on AI adoption and its effects on jobs, productivity, and output. Specifically, we ask executives about AI usage, its effects at their own firms over the past three years and, looking ahead, what they anticipate over the next three years. We find four main results. First, 69% of firms actively use AI, with higher usage rates at younger and more productive firms. Second, more than two thirds of executives regularly use AI, but their usage rate averages only 1.5 hours a week. Third, executives report little own-firm impact of AI over the last 3 years, with nine-in-ten reporting no impact on employment or productivity. Fourth, these same executives predict sizable effects over the next 3 years, predicting that AI will boost productivity at their firms by an average of 1.4%, raise output 0.8%, and cut employment 0.7%. In contrast, employees anticipate that AI will raise employment 0.5% at their firms in the next 3 years, highlighting an expectations gap between employers and employees.
34836.zh_abstract: 我们对美国、英国、德国和澳大利亚企业近6000名高级业务主管进行了调查，以获取关于人工智能采用及其对就业、生产率和产出影响的新证据。具体来说，我们询问了高管们关于人工智能的使用情况、过去三年对其自身企业的影响，以及展望未来三年他们的预期。我们发现了四个主要结果。第一，69%的企业积极使用人工智能，在更年轻和生产率更高的企业中使用率更高。第二，超过三分之二的高管经常使用人工智能，但他们的平均使用时间仅为每周1.5小时。第三，高管们报告称，过去三年人工智能对自身企业影响甚微，十分之九的人报告对就业或生产率没有影响。第四，这些相同的高管预测未来三年将产生显著影响，预计人工智能将使其企业生产率平均提高1.4%，产出增加0.8%，就业减少0.7%。相比之下，员工预计未来三年人工智能将使其企业就业增加0.5%，这凸显了雇主与员工之间的预期差距。
34836.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, ME, PR；JEL：E0

34835.title: Self-assessed Life-Cycle Saving Behavior in the U.S. and Singapore: Procrastination Versus Economic Shocks
34835.zh_title: 美国和新加坡的自我评估生命周期储蓄行为：拖延与经济冲击
34835.authors: Susann Rohwedder, Michael D. Hurd, Axel H. Börsch-Supan
34835.abstract: It is widely believed that procrastination contributes to under-saving. Using household survey data from the United States and Singapore, we find little evidence to support this view. In both countries, indicators of procrastination have only weak, if any, explanatory power for saving regret. About half of respondents aged 60–74 expressed regret about not having saved more, but this sentiment was primarily associated with exposure to economic shocks rather than procrastination. A larger share of U.S. respondents reported saving regret, reflecting their greater exposure to adverse shocks. In contrast, Singapore’s system of mandatory saving for retirement, housing, and health expenses appears to mitigate the long-term financial impact of such shocks. However, with little opportunity for risk pooling, Singapore households still remain vulnerable to shocks. These findings highlight the importance of institutional design in risk protection over the lifecycle.
34835.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为拖延会导致储蓄不足。利用美国和新加坡的家庭调查数据，我们几乎没有发现支持这一观点的证据。在这两个国家，拖延指标对储蓄遗憾的解释力即使有也很弱。大约一半60-74岁的受访者表达了对自己没有储蓄更多的遗憾，但这种情绪主要与经济冲击的暴露有关，而非拖延。报告储蓄遗憾的美国受访者比例更高，这反映了他们遭受更多不利冲击。相比之下，新加坡针对退休、住房和医疗费用的强制性储蓄制度似乎减轻了此类冲击的长期财务影响。然而，由于几乎没有风险分担的机会，新加坡家庭仍然容易受到冲击。这些发现突显了制度设计在生命周期风险保护中的重要性。

34834.title: GPT as a Measurement Tool
34834.authors: Hemanth Asirvatham, Elliott Mokski, Andrei Shleifer
34834.abstract: We present the GABRIEL software package, which uses GPT to quantify attributes in qualitative data (e.g. how “pro innovation” a speech is). GPT is evaluated on classification and attribute rating performance against 1000+ human annotated tasks across a range of topics and data. We find that GPT as a measurement tool is accurate across domains and generally indistinguishable from human evaluators. Our evidence indicates that labeling results do not depend on the exact prompting strategy used, and that GPT is not relying on training data contamination or inferring attributes from other attributes. We showcase the possibilities of GABRIEL by quantifying novel and granular trends in Congressional remarks, social media toxicity, and county-level school curricula. We then apply GABRIEL to study the history of tech adoption, using it to assemble a novel dataset of 37,000 technologies. Our analysis documents a tenfold decline of time lags from invention to adoption over the industrial age, from ~50 years to ~5 years today. We quantify the increasing dominance of companies and the U.S. in innovation, alongside characteristics that explain whether a technology will be adopted slowly or speedily.
34834.zh_abstract: 我们介绍了GABRIEL软件包，它使用GPT来量化定性数据中的属性（例如，一篇演讲“支持创新”的程度）。GPT在分类和属性评分方面的表现，与跨越一系列主题和数据的1000多个人工标注任务进行了评估。我们发现，作为一种测量工具，GPT在各个领域都是准确的，并且通常与人类评估者无法区分。我们的证据表明，标注结果并不依赖于所使用的具体提示策略，并且GPT并非依赖于训练数据污染或从其他属性推断属性。我们通过量化国会发言、社交媒体毒性以及县级学校课程中新颖且细粒度的趋势，展示了GABRIEL的可能性。然后，我们应用GABRIEL研究技术采用的历史，利用它构建了一个包含37,000项技术的新数据集。我们的分析记录了工业时代从发明到采用的时间滞后下降了十倍，从大约50年下降到今天的约5年。我们量化了企业和美国在创新中日益增长的主导地位，以及解释一项技术将被缓慢还是快速采用的特征。

34833.title: Dynamic Complementarity
34833.authors: James J. Heckman, Haihan Tian, Zijian Zhang, Jin Zhou
34833.abstract: Dynamic complementarity is the concept that past investments that lead to higher stocks of skill at one age promote the growth of skills from investment at that age. We define and provide evidence on dynamic complementarity using unique Chinese data from a home visiting program for young children targeted to parents in rural China. In addition, we investigate growth in learning due to innate, parental, and environmental factors that occur in the absence of any formal intervention.
34833.zh_abstract: 动态互补性是指这样一个概念：过去导致某个年龄技能存量更高的投资，会促进该年龄投资所带来的技能增长。我们利用来自中国农村地区一项针对幼儿家长的家访项目的独特数据，对动态互补性进行了定义并提供了证据。此外，我们研究了在没有正式干预的情况下，由于先天、父母和环境因素导致的学习增长。
34833.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE, TWP；JEL：C1, C5, D83, J01

34832.title: Gender Norms and Development
34832.authors: Erica M. Field, Madeline McKelway, Alessandra Voena
34832.abstract: Gender norms—shared expectations about appropriate behavior by gender—shape the outcomes of men and women across societies, and are correlated with GDP per capita. This chapter surveys the literature on gender norms and economic development, focusing on the pervasive and traditional ‘male breadwinner norm’ that assigns men to market work and women to domestic responsibilities. We review empirical approaches to measuring norms, including direct survey questions on attitudes, second-order beliefs about others' views, and behavioral proxies. Establishing causal effects of norms on behavior poses significant challenges, and we review a range of approaches to identify this link. We then present the leading hypotheses about the origins of gender norms in different forms of biological comparative advantage. We discuss societal forces sustaining norms, including self-reinforcing feedback between behavior and beliefs, other institutions, and backlash against norm violations. We highlight the bidirectional relationship between norms and development: economic growth can liberalize norms through structural transformation, legal reforms, and diffusion mechanisms, whereas talent misallocation stemming from gender norms may constrain growth. We conclude by discussing gender norms beyond the breadwinner domain, including norms around kinship, property, leadership, violence, mobility, sexuality, appearance, and behavior, and identify promising directions for future research.
34832.zh_abstract: 性别规范——关于不同性别适当行为的共同期望——塑造了社会中男性和女性的结果，并且与人均GDP相关。本章回顾了关于性别规范与经济发展的文献，重点关注普遍且传统的“男性养家糊口规范”，该规范将男性分配至市场工作，女性分配至家庭责任。我们回顾了衡量规范的实证方法，包括关于态度的直接调查问题、关于他人看法的二阶信念以及行为代理变量。建立规范对行为的因果效应面临重大挑战，我们回顾了一系列识别这种联系的方法。然后，我们提出了关于性别规范在不同形式的生物比较优势中起源的主要假说。我们讨论了维持规范的社会力量，包括行为与信念之间的自我强化反馈、其他制度以及对违反规范的反弹。我们强调了规范与发展之间的双向关系：经济增长可以通过结构转型、法律改革和扩散机制使规范自由化，而源于性别规范的人才错配可能会制约增长。最后，我们讨论了养家糊口领域之外的性别规范，包括关于亲属关系、财产、领导力、暴力、流动性、性、外表和行为的规范，并指出了未来研究的有前景的方向。

34831.title: More Hours, More Work: Head Start Expansions Boost Maternal Employment
34831.zh_title: 更多时间，更多工作：Head Start扩张促进母亲就业
34831.authors: Chloe Gibbs, Esra Kose, Maria Rosales-Rueda
34831.abstract: Women’s employment remains highly sensitive to childcare constraints, making childcare availability a critical lever for supporting mothers’ labor force attachment. We study the effects of expanded full-day programming in Head Start, using the 2016 federal funding initiative that targeted grantees with low full-day enrollment. Linking administrative program data, geo-coded center locations, and household data on employment, we estimate a difference-in-differences design by comparing mothers of young children in treated and untreated areas. The policy increased full-day enrollment by 19 percent and raised single mothers’ employment (1.9%), hours (2.5%), and earnings (6.5%). Results show that extending program duration meaningfully improves maternal labor market outcomes.
34831.zh_abstract: 女性的就业仍然对儿童保育限制高度敏感，这使得儿童保育的可获得性成为支持母亲劳动力依附的关键杠杆。我们研究了Head Start项目中全日制课程扩张的影响，利用了2016年针对全日制入学率低的受助机构的联邦资助计划。通过关联行政项目数据、地理编码的中心位置以及关于就业的家庭数据，我们采用双重差分设计，比较了受处理地区和未受处理地区幼儿的母亲。该政策使全日制入学率提高了19%，并提高了单身母亲的就业率（1.9%）、工作时间（2.5%）和收入（6.5%）。结果表明，延长项目时长能显著改善母亲的劳动力市场结果。

34830.title: Using Life Satisfaction Data to Measure Parents' Child Gender Preferences
34830.zh_title: 利用生活满意度数据衡量父母对子女性别的偏好
34830.authors: Anna Barbeta-Margarit, Seema Jayachandran, Suanna Oh
34830.abstract: Can questions about life satisfaction be used to measure parental preferences for daughters versus sons? Daughter preference has rarely been documented in the literature, even in matrilineal settings. One possible reason is that the commonly used measures of parental gender preference, such as fertility-stopping rules and sex ratio at birth, are ill-suited to high-fertility settings. We instead assess maternal preferences in Malawi by examining the life satisfaction of women who currently have one child, comparing those with a daughter to those with a son. We find that in matrilineal (but not patrilineal) households, having a daughter increases mothers' life satisfaction, relative to having a son.
34830.zh_abstract: 关于生活满意度的问题能否用于衡量父母对女儿相对于儿子的偏好？即使在母系社会中，文献中也鲜有记录女儿偏好。一个可能的原因是，常用的父母性别偏好衡量指标，如生育停止规则和出生性别比，并不适用于高生育率环境。我们转而通过考察目前有一个孩子的女性的生活满意度来评估马拉维的母亲偏好，比较那些有女儿和那些有儿子的女性。我们发现，在母系（而非父系）家庭中，与有儿子相比，有女儿会提高母亲的生活满意度。
34830.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, POL；JEL：I31, J13, J16, O12, Z13

34829.title: Mass Media and Contraception Use: An Experimental Test of Modernization Theory in Burkina Faso
34829.zh_title: 大众媒体与避孕药具使用：布基纳法索现代化理论的实验检验
34829.authors: Rachel Glennerster, Joanna Murray, Victor Pouliquen
34829.abstract: This paper tests whether the arrival of mass media triggers a decline in fertility, a central prediction of modernization theory. Using a field experiment, we vary exposure to mass media and its content in a quarter of Burkina Faso. We provide radios to 1,600 women without previous access to mass media. Half live in status quo areas and half in areas where the local radio station was randomly selected to air a science-based family planning campaign. Contrary to modernization theory and previous literature, gaining access to status quo mass media decreases contraception use by 14 percent and reinforces traditional gender norms. In contrast, receiving a radio in campaign areas boosts contraception use by 16 percent. The campaign also led to a 9 percent reduction in births and a 0.3 standard deviation increase in reported welfare. Reduced belief in misinformation rather than shifts in attitudes and preferences drives the result.
34829.zh_abstract: 本文检验了大众媒体的出现是否会引发生育率下降，这是现代化理论的一个核心预测。通过一项实地实验，我们在布基纳法索四分之一的地区改变了大众媒体的接触机会及其内容。我们向1600名此前无法接触大众媒体的女性提供了收音机。其中一半生活在现状区域，另一半生活在当地广播电台被随机选中播放基于科学的计划生育宣传活动的区域。与现代化理论和以往文献相反，接触现状大众媒体使避孕药具使用率降低了14%，并强化了传统的性别规范。相比之下，在宣传区域收到收音机则使避孕药具使用率提高了16%。该宣传活动还导致出生率降低了9%，并使得报告的生活福利增加了0.3个标准差。对错误信息信念的减少（而非态度和偏好的转变）驱动了这一结果。

34828.title: Seeing Green: The Effects of Financial Exposures on Support for Climate Action
34828.zh_title: 看到绿色：金融风险暴露对气候行动支持度的影响
34828.authors: Michelle Hanlon, Saumitra Jha, Namrata Kala, Nemit Shroff, Chagai M. Weiss
34828.abstract: Despite the large common net benefits of climate mitigation, broad-based political consensus for large-scale policy action remains elusive. We hypothesize that financial exposure to energy stocks central to the green transition can induce learning and greater support for climate mitigation policies. We conduct a RCT which randomizes both the presence of financial market exposure to the energy sector, as well as which type of portfolio—fossil-fuel (brown) or renewable energy (green)—is given to an individual. Treatment increases support for mitigation action and intent to undertake adaptation, with positive support caused by ownership of both green and brown assets. The effects are particularly pronounced among individuals who are initially more climate-skeptic, and persist eight months after treatment. We present evidence consistent with learning as the primary mechanism: treated respondents are more likely to consume financial news and become more financially knowledgeable, less likely to obtain news from polarized sources, and better able to accurately predict the environmental impacts of green and brown firms.
34828.zh_abstract: 尽管气候减缓行动具有巨大的共同净收益，但针对大规模政策行动的广泛政治共识仍然难以达成。我们假设，对绿色转型至关重要的能源股的金融风险暴露可以引发学习效应，并增加对气候减缓政策的支持。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，该试验随机化了个人对能源部门的金融市场风险暴露的存在与否，以及个人被给予的投资组合类型——化石燃料（棕色）或可再生能源（绿色）。处理措施增加了对减缓行动的支持以及采取适应措施的意愿，这种积极支持是由同时持有绿色和棕色资产引起的。这种效应在最初对气候更持怀疑态度的个体中尤为显著，并在处理后八个月仍然持续存在。我们提供的证据与学习作为主要机制相一致：接受处理的受访者更有可能消费财经新闻并变得更加具备金融知识，更少从两极分化的来源获取新闻，并且能够更准确地预测绿色和棕色企业的环境影响。
34828.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, POL；JEL：G11, O13, O16, P18, Q49, Q50, Q52, Q53, Q54, Q56, Q58

34827.title: Threshold Disclosure in Collective Decisions
34827.zh_title: 集体决策中的阈值披露
34827.authors: Luca Braghieri, Leonardo Bursztyn, Jan Fasnacht
34827.abstract: Voting-based collective decisions are typically made either anonymously or publicly. Anonymous voting protects truthful expression but conceals individual behavior; public voting provides information about individual votes, but, when one option is socially stigmatized, it can distort participation and choices. We introduce threshold majority voting, in which voters choose a disclosure threshold determining whether and when their votes are revealed. In an experiment at UC Berkeley on the participation of transgender women in women’s sports, public voting nearly doubles abstention and reduces support for the stigmatized option. Threshold voting eliminates these distortions while revealing one-third of individual votes.
34827.zh_abstract: 基于投票的集体决策通常以匿名或公开方式进行。匿名投票保护了真实表达，但掩盖了个人行为；公开投票提供了关于个人投票的信息，但是，当某一选项受到社会污名化时，它可能会扭曲参与和选择。我们引入了阈值多数投票制，在这种制度下，投票者选择一个披露阈值，该阈值决定了他们的投票是否以及何时被揭示。在加州大学伯克利分校进行的一项关于跨性别女性参与女性体育运动的实验中，公开投票使弃权率几乎翻倍，并减少了对受污名化选项的支持。阈值投票消除了这些扭曲，同时揭示了三分之一的个人投票。

34826.title: A Population Perspective on the Beneficiaries of Public and Private Assistance Immediately and over the Long-term After a Major Disaster
34826.zh_title: 重大灾害后公共和私人援助受益者的人口视角：即时与长期分析
34826.authors: Elizabeth Frankenberg, Nicholas Ingwersen, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
34826.abstract: Natural disasters undermine economic development, destroying lives, livelihoods, the built and natural environment. Public assistance programs follow, but knowledge of their reach, impact and evolution is limited. We address this gap, analyzing population-representative longitudinal survey data collected in Indonesia before and for two decades after the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami which was followed by a large recovery program involving multiple major actors. Those who lived, at the time of the tsunami, in communities that were badly damaged, were far more likely to receive aid and received larger amounts than residents of other areas immediately after the tsunami. Those gaps were small and insignificant four years post-tsunami. Conditional on exposure, individual attributes also shaped receipt which reached the vulnerable, particularly poor and female-headed households. Housing assistance, distributed several years post-tsunami to those who lost homes, was critical in the eyes of recipients, playing a key role as they rebuilt livelihoods.
34826.zh_abstract: 自然灾害破坏了经济发展，摧毁了生命、生计以及建成和自然环境。公共援助项目随之而来，但对其覆盖范围、影响和演变的认识是有限的。我们填补了这一空白，分析了在2004年印度洋海啸之前以及之后二十年期间在印度尼西亚收集的具有人口代表性的纵向调查数据，该海啸之后启动了一个涉及多个主要行为体的大型恢复计划。在海啸发生时，那些生活在遭受严重破坏的社区中的人，在海啸发生后立即获得援助的可能性远高于其他地区的居民，并且获得的援助金额也更大。这些差距在海啸发生四年后变得微小且不显著。在给定受灾暴露程度的情况下，个人特征也影响了援助的获得，援助惠及了弱势群体，特别是贫困家庭和女性户主家庭。住房援助是在海啸发生数年后向失去家园的人发放的，在受助者看来至关重要，在他们重建生计的过程中发挥了关键作用。

34825.title: Hierarchy and Performance Pay: Experimental Evidence from the Public Sector
34825.zh_title: 层级结构与绩效薪酬：来自公共部门的实验证据
34825.authors: Garance Genicot, Zahra Mansoor, Ghazala Mansuri
34825.abstract: Frontline workers in public bureaucracies perform multidimensional tasks and rely on supervisors who both monitor performance and supply essential managerial inputs. We study how incentive design should account for these interactions using a conceptual framework and a province-wide randomized experiment with the Punjab Agriculture Extension Department in Pakistan. Across 131 tehsils, we compare: (i) an Objective pay-for-performance scheme tied to digital activity metrics; (ii) a Subjective scheme in which supervisors allocate bonuses; and (iii) a Subjective Plus scheme that preserves discretion but introduces light-touch oversight of supervisors. \nAll three schemes increase outreach, but through distinct channels. Objective incentives primarily raise intensive effort—repeat visits to the same farmers—while Subjective Plus expands the extensive margin by inducing supervisors to schedule more farmer trainings and broaden geographic coverage. Contrary to standard multitasking concerns, meeting length—a proxy for engagement quality—increases across all arms. \nOversight of supervisors also reduces favoritism in bonus allocation and improves merit-based evaluation, leading to greater access and yield gains among marginalized farmers. The results show that light-touch monitoring of middle management can substantially amplify the effectiveness and equity of performance pay in multi-layered bureaucracies.
34825.zh_abstract: 公共官僚机构的一线工作人员执行多维任务，并依赖于既监督绩效又提供关键管理投入的主管。我们通过一个概念性框架和在巴基斯坦旁遮普省农业推广部门进行的一项全省范围的随机实验，研究了激励设计应如何考虑这些互动。在131个乡中，我们比较了：(i) 与数字活动指标挂钩的客观绩效薪酬方案；(ii) 主管分配奖金的主观方案；以及 (iii) 保留自由裁量权但引入对主管的轻度监督的主观增强方案。所有三种方案都增加了外展服务，但通过不同的渠道。客观激励主要提高了集约化努力——对同一农户的重复访问——而主观增强方案则通过促使主管安排更多农民培训并扩大地理覆盖范围，扩展了广延边际。与标准的多任务担忧相反，会议时长——作为互动质量的代理指标——在所有实验组中都有所增加。对主管的监督也减少了奖金分配中的偏袒行为，并改善了基于绩效的评估，从而为边缘化农民带来了更大的接触机会和产量增长。结果表明，对中层管理人员的轻度监督可以显著增强多层官僚机构中绩效薪酬的有效性和公平性。

34824.title: Interest Rate Pass-Through With Adjustable Rate Mortgages
34824.zh_title: 浮动利率抵押贷款下的利率传导
34824.authors: Manuel Adelino, Miguel A. Ferreira, Sujiao Zhao
34824.abstract: Adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs) transmit monetary policy less directly than often assumed. We exploit quasi-experimental variation in ARM rate reset timing in Portugal—where over 92% of mortgages are indexed to Euribor—around the ECB’s 2022–2023 tightening cycle to estimate responses to mortgage payment shocks. After reset dates, mortgage renegotiations increase by 10 percentage points, lender switching by 4, partial prepayments by 5, and full prepayments by 3, offsetting about 17% of the payment increase implied by policy rates. Responses occur only immediately after resets, consistent with selective inattention, and are largest among younger, more educated, and higher-balance borrowers. Supply-side factors amplify these effects: as rates rise and bank competition intensifies, households at more flexible banks renegotiate, switch lenders, and prepay more, while greater broker presence further increases lender switching. Our findings suggest that monetary policy pass-through in ARM-dominated markets depends on borrower behavior, market frictions, and sticky deposit rates.
34824.zh_abstract: 浮动利率抵押贷款对货币政策的传导并不像通常假设的那样直接。我们利用葡萄牙（该国超过92%的抵押贷款与欧元银行间同业拆借利率挂钩）在2022-2023年欧洲央行紧缩周期前后浮动利率抵押贷款利率重置时间的准实验性变化，来估计对抵押贷款支付冲击的反应。在重置日期之后，抵押贷款重新谈判增加了10个百分点，贷款机构转换增加了4个百分点，部分提前还款增加了5个百分点，全额提前还款增加了3个百分点，抵消了政策利率所隐含的支付增长中约17%的部分。这些反应仅在重置后立即发生，这与选择性忽视是一致的，并且在更年轻、受教育程度更高、贷款余额更高的借款人中最为显著。供给侧因素放大了这些效应：随着利率上升和银行竞争加剧，在更灵活的银行，家庭进行重新谈判、转换贷款机构和提前还款更多，而更大的经纪人存在进一步增加了贷款机构转换。我们的研究结果表明，在浮动利率抵押贷款主导的市场中，货币政策传导取决于借款人行为、市场摩擦和粘性存款利率。
34824.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：D14, E44, E52, G21

34823.title: Currency Pegs, Trade Imbalances and Unemployment: A Reevaluation of the China Shock
34823.zh_title: 货币盯住、贸易失衡与失业：对“中国冲击”的重新评估
34823.authors: Bumsoo Kim, Marc De la Barrea, Masao Fukui
34823.abstract: We develop a dynamic quantitative model of trade and labor adjustment, incorporating nominal wage rigidity and consumption–saving decisions, to study how China’s currency peg interacted with its rapid growth in shaping the US economy. We show that the peg temporarily boosts China’s export growth by preventing an appreciation of the Chinese currency, thereby amplifying the US labor-market consequences of the China shock. At the same time, the temporary export boom increases China’s savings and leads to a larger US trade deficit. Calibrating the model to match trade and labor-market flow data, we find that China’s currency peg played a quantitatively important role in the US manufacturing decline, the widening US trade deficit, and unemployment dynamics. These results underscore the importance of exchange-rate adjustment (or the lack thereof) for understanding trade shocks. We also find that the overall welfare impact of the China shock remains significant and positive.
34823.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个包含名义工资刚性和消费-储蓄决策的动态定量贸易与劳动力调整模型，以研究中国的货币盯住制度如何与其快速增长相互作用，共同塑造了美国经济。我们表明，盯住制度通过阻止人民币升值暂时促进了中国的出口增长，从而放大了“中国冲击”对美国劳动力市场的影响。同时，暂时的出口繁荣增加了中国的储蓄，并导致了更大的美国贸易逆差。通过校准模型以匹配贸易和劳动力市场流动数据，我们发现中国的货币盯住制度在美国制造业衰退、美国贸易逆差扩大以及失业动态中发挥了数量上重要的作用。这些结果强调了汇率调整（或缺乏调整）对于理解贸易冲击的重要性。我们还发现，“中国冲击”的整体福利影响仍然是显著且为正的。

34822.title: Incentives and Prosocial Discomfort: A Laboratory Experiment
34822.zh_title: 激励与亲社会不适感：一项实验室实验
34822.authors: Grace E. Steward, Mario Macis, Nicola Lacetera, Jeffrey P. Kahn, Vikram Chib
34822.abstract: We conducted a within-subject laboratory experiment in which participants decided whether to experience physical discomfort for charity, with or without additional personal compensation. Acceptance decreased with greater discomfort and increased with both larger charitable donations and personal payments. We show that private monetary incentives and prosocial benefits interact in a less-than-additive way: personal compensation raises participation but attenuates the marginal impact of charitable donations, making the combined impact of private and social rewards smaller than the sum of their separate effects. We also find suggestive evidence that the sequencing of compensated and uncompensated choices may change the responsiveness to charitable benefits. Overall, our results indicate that context, especially the presence (and timing) of private rewards, can affect the relationship between incentives and prosocial behavior.
34822.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项被试内设计的实验室实验，参与者在其中决定是否为了慈善事业而体验身体不适，无论是否有额外的个人补偿。接受度随着不适感的增加而降低，并随着慈善捐款和个人报酬的增加而提高。我们表明，私人金钱激励和亲社会利益以一种低于加总的方式相互作用：个人补偿提高了参与度，但削弱了慈善捐款的边际影响，使得私人和社会回报的综合影响小于它们各自效果的总和。我们还发现提示性证据，表明有偿和无偿选择的顺序可能会改变对慈善利益的响应度。总体而言，我们的结果表明，情境，特别是私人奖励的存在（和时机），可以影响激励与亲社会行为之间的关系。

34821.title: Marriage and the Intergenerational Mobility of Women: Evidence from Marriage Certificates 1850-1920
34821.zh_title: 婚姻与女性的代际流动性：来自1850-1920年结婚证书的证据
34821.authors: Katherine Eriksson, Gregory Niemesh, Myera Rashid, Jacqueline Craig
34821.abstract: We document that women’s economic mobility improved nearly a century before married women gained broad labor market opportunities. Using Massachusetts marriage registers linked to U.S. censuses (1850–1920), we create new father–child links for women to estimate intergenerational mobility and assortative mating, overcoming a key historical linkage barrier. Estimates from a structural marriage market model suggest assortative mating fell 61% from 1850–1870 to 1900–1920. Counterfactuals imply women’s mobility would have been far lower absent the decline in assortative mating. Had late cohorts faced early cohort sorting, the rank–rank slope between a woman’s father and husband would have been 2.5 times higher.
