34821.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在已婚女性获得广泛的劳动力市场机会之前近一个世纪，女性的经济流动性就已经得到改善。通过使用与美国人口普查（1850-1920年）相关联的马萨诸塞州婚姻登记记录，我们为女性建立了新的父-子链接，以估计代际流动性和选型婚配，克服了一个关键的历史链接障碍。来自结构性婚姻市场模型的估计表明，选型婚配从1850-1870年到1900-1920年下降了61%。反事实分析表明，如果没有选型婚配的下降，女性的流动性将会低得多。如果较晚的队列面临较早队列的婚配模式，那么女性父亲与丈夫之间的等级-等级斜率将会高出2.5倍。

34889.title: Optimal Simple Ratings
34889.abstract: We study optimal simple rating systems that partition sellers into a finite number of tiers. We show that optimal ratings must be threshold partitions, and that for linear supply and Cournot competition with constant marginal cost, optimal thresholds solve a k-means clustering problem requiring only the quality distribution. For convex (concave) supply functions, optimal thresholds are higher (lower) than the k-means solution. For log-concave distributions, two-tier certification captures at least 50 percent of maximum welfare gains from full disclosure, with five tiers typically achieving over 90 percent. Applications to eBay and Medicare Advantage data illustrate our method.
34889.zh_abstract: 我们研究了将卖家划分为有限数量等级的最优简单评级系统。我们证明，最优评级必须是阈值划分，并且对于线性供给和具有恒定边际成本的古诺竞争，最优阈值解决了一个仅需质量分布的k均值聚类问题。对于凸（凹）供给函数，最优阈值高于（低于）k均值解。对于对数凹分布，两级认证至少能捕获完全信息披露下最大福利收益的50%，而五级认证通常能达到90%以上。应用于eBay和Medicare Advantage数据的例子说明了我们的方法。
34889.meta: Programs：IO, TWP；JEL：D21, D47, D60, D82, L11

34888.title: Drivers of Dollar Share in Foreign Exchange Reserves
34888.zh_title: 外汇储备中美元份额的驱动因素
34888.abstract: The share of US dollar assets in the official foreign exchange reserve portfolios of central banks, at times, is taken as an indicator of the dollar's global status. We provide a decomposition that shows two distinct channels contributing to the changes in the dollar share of reserves aggregated across countries: shifts in preferences for dollar assets, and changes in reserve balances driven by countries whose portfolio allocations differ from the aggregate. We document how the concentrated nature of foreign exchange reserve holdings allows countries that contribute a large share of aggregated reserves to exert substantial influence on aggregate dollar shares over time, potentially dominating the narrative. In recent periods, the key contributors to changes in aggregate preference shifts for dollar assets are changes in bilateral country trade with the United States and dollar debt share, with geopolitics additionally working through the investment tranches of central bank portfolios. Diversification away from dollar assets is more prevalent conditional on official reserves of countries being large enough to satisfy country liquidity needs.
34888.zh_abstract: 各国央行官方外汇储备组合中美元资产的份额，有时被视为美元全球地位的指标。我们提供了一个分解，显示有两个不同的渠道导致了各国汇总的美元储备份额的变化：对美元资产偏好的转变，以及由投资组合配置与总体不同的国家所驱动的储备余额变化。我们记录了外汇储备持有的集中性质如何使得那些贡献了汇总储备很大份额的国家，能够随着时间的推移对总体美元份额施加实质性影响，并可能主导相关叙事。在近期，导致对美元资产总体偏好转变的关键贡献因素是双边国家与美国贸易的变化以及美元债务份额，而地缘政治则通过央行投资组合的投资部分额外发挥作用。当一国的官方储备足够大以满足其流动性需求时，从美元资产分散化的现象更为普遍。

34887.title: A Theory of Subsidy Harvesting in Livestock Price Insurance
34887.zh_title: 牲畜价格保险中的补贴套利理论
34887.authors: Michael K. Adjemian, A. Ford Ramsey
34887.abstract: USDA designed the Livestock Risk Protection (LRP) program to help producers insure against declining prices for fed cattle, feeder cattle, and swine. Prices in derivatives markets determine program indemnities, making LRP policies similar to put options. Beginning in 2019, USDA made several changes to the program to encourage producer takeup, including increased premium subsidies. We introduce a theoretical model to show that subsidizing LRP premiums invites producers to “subsidy harvest,” i.e. extract the subsidy as an arbitrage by simultaneously taking an offsetting position in the options market—potentially removing the downside protection the program was intended to provide. The subsidy harvest is a pure rent and costlier than a direct payment because it requires administrative oversight and federally-subsidized delivery through approved insurance providers. According to the model, the government’s premium subsidy leads producers to favor LRP-oriented strategies over market options alone, while their choice to offset actual risk protection using options depends on individual risk tolerance and wealth objectives.
34887.zh_abstract: 美国农业部设计了牲畜风险保护（LRP）计划，以帮助生产者防范育肥牛、架子猪和生猪价格下跌的风险。衍生品市场的价格决定了该计划的赔偿额，使得LRP保单类似于看跌期权。从2019年开始，美国农业部对该计划进行了多项修改以鼓励生产者参与，包括增加保费补贴。我们引入了一个理论模型来证明，补贴LRP保费会诱使生产者进行“补贴套利”，即通过在期权市场同时建立对冲头寸来提取补贴作为套利——这可能会消除该计划旨在提供的下行保护。这种补贴套利是一种纯粹的租金，并且比直接支付成本更高，因为它需要行政监督和通过批准的保险提供商进行联邦补贴交付。根据该模型，政府的保费补贴导致生产者倾向于选择LRP导向的策略而非单纯的市场期权，而他们选择使用期权来抵消实际风险保护的决定则取决于个人的风险承受能力和财富目标。

34886.title: Shielding Women from Violence: The Effects of Violence Prevention and Monitoring Centers on Intimate Partner Violence in Türkiye
34886.zh_title: 保护妇女免受暴力侵害：土耳其暴力预防与监测中心对亲密伴侣暴力的影响
34886.authors: Gunes Asik, Bilge Erten, Erdal Tekin, Semih Tumen, Hakan Ulucan
34886.abstract: Intimate partner violence remains one of the most serious threats to women's safety worldwide, yet existing evidence on the effectiveness of large-scale institutional protection systems is limited and mixed. This paper evaluates the impact of Violence Prevention and Monitoring Centers on intimate partner violence (IPV) against women in Türkiye. Exploiting the staggered rollout of centers across provinces, we find that the opening of a center reduces female homicides, particularly those perpetrated by intimate partners, by approximately 20 percent. Complementary survey evidence shows that the opening of a center also reduces women's self-reported exposure to physical IPV by 20 percent, with larger effects among younger and less-educated women. Exploring potential mechanisms, we find that centers primarily reduce violence by lowering barriers to help-seeking and improving coordination across police, legal, and social services: following the opening of a center, women become more likely to seek support from women's organizations and social services, while direct applications to prosecutors decline. We find no evidence of effects on gender attitudes, labor market outcomes, relationship status, marriage market outcomes, or mental health, suggesting violence reductions operate through improved access to protection rather than changes in norms or economic independence. The estimated effects are stronger in provinces with more gender-progressive norms and stronger institutional capacity, highlighting the importance of complementary social and institutional environments.
34886.zh_abstract: 亲密伴侣暴力仍然是全球妇女安全面临的最严重威胁之一，然而关于大规模制度化保护系统有效性的现有证据有限且结论不一。本文评估了暴力预防与监测中心对土耳其妇女遭受亲密伴侣暴力（IPV）的影响。利用各中心在各省份的逐步设立，我们发现，一个中心的开设使女性他杀案件，特别是由亲密伴侣实施的案件，减少了约20%。补充性的调查证据表明，中心的开设也使女性自我报告的身体IPV暴露减少了20%，对年轻和受教育程度较低的女性影响更大。在探索潜在机制时，我们发现，这些中心主要通过降低寻求帮助的障碍以及改善警方、法律和社会服务之间的协调来减少暴力：在中心开设后，女性更有可能向妇女组织和社会服务机构寻求支持，而直接向检察官提出的申请则有所减少。我们没有发现对性别态度、劳动力市场结果、关系状况、婚姻市场结果或心理健康产生影响的证据，这表明暴力的减少是通过改善获得保护的途径实现的，而非通过规范或经济独立性的改变。在性别观念更进步、制度能力更强的省份，估计的影响更强，这凸显了互补的社会和制度环境的重要性。
34886.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：I18, J12, J16, K42, O15

34885.title: Demographics and Technology Diffusion: Evidence from Mobile Payments
34885.zh_title: 人口结构与技术扩散：来自移动支付的证据
34885.authors: Nicolas Crouzet, Pulak Ghosh, Apoorv Gupta, Filippo Mezzanotti
34885.abstract: We show that the age composition of the population can shape the speed at which businesses adopt new technologies, using evidence from mobile payments in India. Consumers' propensity to use new payment technologies declines with age, creating stronger incentives for businesses serving younger customers to accept these technologies. We document this pattern in the rollout of a mobile payment option by a major fintech company. A model where consumer attitudes toward technology vary by age implies that business adoption is inefficiently low, with the young bearing disproportionate welfare losses from network externalities. Jointly subsidizing transaction and adoption costs restores efficiency.
34885.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度移动支付的证据表明，人口的年龄构成可以影响企业采用新技术的速度。消费者使用新支付技术的倾向随年龄增长而下降，这为服务更年轻客户的企业接受这些技术创造了更强的激励。我们在一家大型金融科技公司推出移动支付选项的过程中记录了这一模式。一个消费者对技术的态度随年龄变化的模型意味着，企业采用率低效地偏低，年轻人因网络外部性而承受不成比例的福利损失。联合补贴交易成本和采用成本可以恢复效率。
34885.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：G23, J11, O33

34884.title: Industrial Policies for Multi-Stage Production: The Battle for Battery-Powered Vehicles
34884.zh_title: 多阶段生产的产业政策：电动汽车之战
34884.authors: Keith Head, Thierry Mayer, Marc Melitz, Chenying Yang
34884.abstract: We model a multi-stage supply chain for EVs from battery production to vehicle distribution. Given industrial policies, firms select where to open facilities at each stage. This is a difficult combinatorial choice problem that we solve with a fast mixed integer linear programming formulation. We estimate the variable and fixed costs parameters using SMM. Counterfactual simulations reveal a tension between boosting EV adoption and promoting domestic supply chains. Due to increasing returns, even unconditional subsidies raise the number of factories in the subsidizing region—by about 16% for EVs and 7% for cells in North America, and even more in Europe. Theoretically, local assembly requirements can push down delivered marginal costs relative to unconditional subsidies. Empirically, local content requirements quadruple the expansion of cell factories in America, but they drive up costs and reduce subsidy uptake, undoing more than half of the EV adoption stimulus coming from pure buyer subsidies.
34884.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个从电池生产到车辆分销的电动汽车多阶段供应链模型。给定产业政策，企业选择在每个阶段在何处开设工厂。这是一个困难的组合选择问题，我们通过一个快速的混合整数线性规划公式来解决。我们使用模拟矩估计法（SMM）估计了可变成本和固定成本参数。反事实模拟揭示了促进电动汽车普及与推动国内供应链之间的张力。由于规模报酬递增，即使是无条件补贴也会提高补贴地区的工厂数量——在北美，电动汽车工厂数量增加约16%，电池工厂增加约7%，在欧洲则更多。理论上，本地组装要求可以相对于无条件补贴降低交付的边际成本。实证上，本地成分要求使美国电池工厂的扩张规模翻了两番，但它们推高了成本并降低了补贴利用率，抵消了纯消费者补贴带来的电动汽车普及刺激效果的一半以上。

34883.title: Shopping From Home
34883.authors: Scott R. Baker, Nicholas Bloom, Stephanie G. Johnson, Jana Obradović
34883.abstract: Conducting a new survey on the Nielsen Consumer panel we examine the impact of working from home (WFH) on shopping, finding three key results. First, WFH changed shopping modes, increasing online shopping and the fraction of trips to stores on weekdays. Second, WFH increased total spending through increased product quantity and range, tilting expenditure towards food and general merchandise and away from health and beauty products. Finally, WFH increased prices paid by shoppers and lowered price elasticities due to a move towards higher-cost products and lower deal usage. The change in prices paid is concentrated among married households, driven by a redistribution of shopping responsibility within the household, especially when the new remote worker is male. We find that remote workers engage in more shopping trips but fewer minutes of shopping. Our results suggest that shifting to remote work increases prices paid for groceries by about 1%, highlighting how WFH is impacting households, retail and inflation.
34883.zh_abstract: 通过对尼尔森消费者面板进行一项新调查，我们研究了在家工作（WFH）对购物的影响，发现了三个关键结果。首先，WFH改变了购物模式，增加了在线购物以及在工作日前往商店购物的比例。其次，WFH通过增加产品数量和种类提高了总支出，使支出向食品和日用商品倾斜，而远离健康和美容产品。最后，WFH提高了购物者支付的价格，并因转向成本更高的产品和减少优惠使用而降低了价格弹性。支付价格的变化集中在已婚家庭中，这是由家庭内部购物责任的重新分配所驱动的，尤其是当新的远程工作者为男性时。我们发现，远程工作者进行更多次购物行程，但每次购物的分钟数更少。我们的结果表明，转向远程工作会使杂货支付价格提高约1%，凸显了WFH对家庭、零售业和通货膨胀的影响。

34882.title: Intangible Intensity
34882.authors: Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Barney Hartman-Glaser, Edward T. Kim, Ki Beom Lee
34882.abstract: We develop a text-based measure of intangible investment intensity derived from firms’ 10-K filings, and offer a general methodology for semantic theme scoring (STS). Our approach further classifies disclosure text into knowledge, customer, and organization capital. Firms with high intangible intensity are smaller, younger, and invest heavily in R&D and human capital. The three subcomponents map cleanly to distinct economic firm types: knowledge-intensive firms are R&D-driven with high valuations and skilled labor; customer-intensive firms are mature, profitable, and commercially oriented; and organization-intensive firms are large, asset-heavy incumbents. Managerial expenditure descriptions thus provide informative signals about intangible investment, complementing financial statements in capturing corporate capital stocks.
34882.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种基于文本的无形投资强度衡量指标，该指标源自公司的10-K文件，并提供了一种通用的语义主题评分（STS）方法。我们的方法进一步将披露文本分类为知识资本、客户资本和组织资本。无形强度高的公司规模更小、更年轻，并在研发和人力资本上投入巨资。这三个子成分清晰地对应到不同的经济企业类型：知识密集型企业是研发驱动型的，具有高估值和熟练劳动力；客户密集型企业是成熟、盈利且商业导向的；组织密集型企业是大型、资产密集型的老牌企业。因此，管理层的支出描述提供了关于无形投资的信息性信号，在捕捉企业资本存量方面补充了财务报表。
34882.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR, TWP；JEL：A0, C0, E0, E01, G0

34881.title: The Local Origins of Business Formation: Entry as a Two-Stage Process
34881.zh_title: 企业形成的本地起源：作为两阶段过程的进入
34881.authors: Emin Dinlersoz, Timothy Dunne, John C. Haltiwanger, Veronika Penciakova
34881.abstract: The business entry literature typically observes firms only at the first hire. We provide a new perspective using linked administrative microdata tracking the universe of U.S. business applications and their transition into employer firms. We model entry as a two-stage process: pursuit of a business idea (proxied by a business application) and implementation (transition). Results show these margins are distinct and associate differently with local conditions. While both margins matter, high-startup locations are characterized by high application intensity, whereas low-startup locations exhibit low transition rates, suggesting geographic disparities in entry arise from different dynamics at each stage of the entrepreneurial process.
34881.zh_abstract: 企业进入文献通常只在首次雇佣时观察企业。我们利用追踪美国所有企业申请及其向雇主企业转变的关联行政微观数据，提供了一个新的视角。我们将进入建模为一个两阶段过程：追求商业创意（以企业申请为代理变量）和实施（转变）。结果表明，这两个阶段是不同的，并且与当地条件有不同的关联。虽然两个阶段都很重要，但高创业率地区的特征是申请强度高，而低创业率地区则表现出较低的转变率，这表明企业进入的地理差异源于创业过程每个阶段的不同动态。

34880.title: Do Informal Social Markets and Online Sellers Help Youths to Avoid E-Cigarette Taxation?
34880.zh_title: 非正式社交市场和在线卖家是否帮助年轻人规避电子烟税收？
34880.authors: Chad D. Cotti, Dhaval M. Dave, Tessie Krishna, Erik T. Nesson, Joseph J. Sabia
34880.abstract: Youths who vape nicotine rarely make in-person purchases of e-cigarettes from a vendor but instead rely on alternative methods to obtain electronic nicotine delivery system (ENDS) products. This study is the first to explore whether the informal social market and online purchasing options help to insulate youths from e-cigarette taxation. Using data from the State Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance Surveys, we find that ENDS taxation reduces both the likelihood of teens obtaining ENDS products through direct in-person retail purchases as well as the likelihood of relying on informal social sources for e-cigarettes such as borrowing vaping devices from friends or third-party purchases. Auxiliary analyses from the Population Assessment of Tobacco and Health are generally consistent with these findings and suggest that impacts are concentrated on the initiation margin; higher ENDS taxes deter youths initiating through direct retail purchases as well as through the social market. For older teens ages 18 and older, however, we find that informal social sources may attenuate the impacts of e-cigarette taxes. Finally, we detect some evidence that ENDS taxes increases the likelihood that teenagers shift to online sources to obtain e-cigarettes.
34880.zh_abstract: 吸食尼古丁电子烟的年轻人很少亲自从供应商处购买电子烟，而是依赖替代方法获取电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS）产品。本研究首次探讨非正式社交市场和在线购买选项是否有助于年轻人免受电子烟税收的影响。使用州青少年风险行为监测调查的数据，我们发现ENDS税收既降低了青少年通过直接亲自零售购买获得ENDS产品的可能性，也降低了他们依赖非正式社交来源（如从朋友处借用电子烟设备或第三方购买）获取电子烟的可能性。来自烟草与健康人口评估的辅助分析普遍与这些发现一致，并表明影响集中在起始阶段；更高的ENDS税收阻止了青少年通过直接零售购买以及通过社交市场开始使用。然而，对于18岁及以上的大龄青少年，我们发现非正式社交来源可能会减弱电子烟税收的影响。最后，我们检测到一些证据表明，ENDS税收增加了青少年转向在线来源获取电子烟的可能性。

34879.title: Bank Runs and Interest Rates: A Revolving Lines Perspective
34879.zh_title: 银行挤兑与利率：循环信贷额度的视角
34879.abstract: Revolving credit is at the core of the banking business. Corporate revolving lines are demandable claims; thus, similar to a traditional run on deposits, sudden and widespread drawdowns can destabilize banks. However, unlike deposits, credit line utilization exhibits substantial interest rate sensitivity. As a result, a run on revolving credit lines is less likely in a high-interest-rate environment but can introduce vulnerabilities when policy rates are lowered. Using an interest rate discontinuity commonly embedded in commercial credit contracts, we propose a methodology to estimate the elasticity of credit demand and apply it to measure the sensitivity of precautionary drawdowns.
34879.zh_abstract: 循环信贷是银行业务的核心。企业循环信贷额度是即期可索偿的债权；因此，类似于传统的存款挤兑，突然且广泛的提款可能会破坏银行的稳定。然而，与存款不同，信贷额度的使用表现出显著的利率敏感性。因此，在高利率环境下，循环信贷额度的挤兑不太可能发生，但在政策利率降低时可能引入脆弱性。利用商业信贷合同中普遍嵌入的利率不连续性，我们提出了一种估计信贷需求弹性的方法，并将其应用于衡量预防性提款的敏感性。

34878.title: Settlement of Litigation May Increase or Decrease Deterrence and Social Welfare
34878.zh_title: 诉讼和解可能增加或减少威慑和社会福利
34878.abstract: Although the obvious effect of settlement is to save litigants the costs of trial, settlement also influences deterrence—and for two reasons. First, because settlement is agreed upon by plaintiffs, it raises their expected return from litigation and thus the probability of suit. This augments deterrence. Second, because settlement is agreed upon by defendants, it lowers their expected costs of litigation and therefore dilutes deterrence. The primary objective of the article is to identify the net effect of settlement on deterrence and on social welfare in a model of accidents, liability, and litigation. The conditions for the bringing of suit in the model are not only that plaintiffs be willing to go to trial, but also that their anticipated settlements would exceed their pretrial costs.
34878.zh_abstract: 尽管和解的明显效果是为诉讼当事人节省审判成本，但和解也会影响威慑——原因有二。首先，由于和解是由原告同意的，它提高了他们从诉讼中获得的预期回报，从而增加了起诉的可能性。这增强了威慑。其次，由于和解是由被告同意的，它降低了他们的预期诉讼成本，因此削弱了威慑。本文的主要目标是在一个包含事故、责任和诉讼的模型中，识别和解对威慑和社会福利的净效应。在该模型中，提起诉讼的条件不仅包括原告愿意进行审判，还包括他们预期的和解金额将超过其审前成本。

34877.title: Job Search, Job Amenities and the Gender Pay Gap
34877.zh_title: 求职、工作非工资属性与性别薪酬差距
34877.authors: R. Jason Faberman, Andreas I. Mueller, Ayşegül Şahin
34877.abstract: This paper studies gender gaps in labor-market outcomes, with a focus on job ladder dynamics. We show that women experience substantially lower wage growth conditional on prior wages despite nearly identical job-to-job transition rates for men and women. To reconcile these observations, we document gender differences in the valuation of nonwage job amenities and in job search behavior, and develop a multi-dimensional job-ladder model with endogenous search effort where workers value both wages and amenities. The model allows for gender heterogeneity in separation rates, search effort, the value of nonemployment, amenity valuations, and bargaining power, enabling a joint analysis of gender wage and employment gaps. A quantitative decomposition shows that differences in preferences for nonwage amenities account for nearly 40 percent of the gender pay gap. Differences in the value of nonemployment and bargaining power explain most of the remainder, with only a limited role for differences in separation rates and search behavior. Finally, we show that increases in job amenities—such as the expansion of remote work—raise the gender wage gap while reducing gender differences in employment.
34877.zh_abstract: 本文研究劳动力市场结果中的性别差距，重点关注职位阶梯动态。我们表明，尽管男性和女性的工作转换率几乎相同，但女性在控制先前工资后的工资增长显著较低。为了调和这些观察结果，我们记录了男性和女性在非工资工作属性估值和求职行为上的性别差异，并构建了一个多维职位阶梯模型，其中包含内生搜索努力，且工人同时重视工资和非工资属性。该模型允许在离职率、搜索努力、非就业价值、非工资属性估值和议价能力方面存在性别异质性，从而能够对性别工资和就业差距进行联合分析。定量分解表明，非工资属性偏好的差异解释了近40%的性别薪酬差距。非就业价值和议价能力的差异解释了剩余的大部分，而离职率和搜索行为的差异作用有限。最后，我们表明，工作非工资属性的增加——例如远程工作的扩展——在缩小性别就业差异的同时，扩大了性别薪酬差距。

34876.title: A Unified Urban Model With Non-Homothetic Housing Demand
34876.zh_title: 具有非位似住房需求的统一城市模型
34876.authors: Frédéric Robert-Nicoud, Pierre-Philippe Combes, Gilles Duranton, Laurent Gobillon
34876.abstract: Canonical urban models fail to jointly account for flexible housing demand, nondegenerate city sizes, and observed urban systems. We introduce a unifying urban framework based on price-independent generalized linear (PIGL) preferences in which housing is a necessity. Non-homothetic housing demand generates income effects that cause urban costs to scale more strongly with population than wages, restoring a unique interior efficient city size under standard assumptions. The framework nests existing canonical models, remains tractable, and is consistent with key empirical regularities, including Zipf’s law and observed housing price elasticities. We also encapsulate a monocentric city model into our framework.
34876.zh_abstract: 经典城市模型无法同时解释灵活的住房需求、非退化的城市规模以及观察到的城市体系。我们引入了一个基于价格独立广义线性（PIGL）偏好的统一城市框架，在该框架中住房是一种必需品。非位似住房需求产生的收入效应导致城市成本随人口增长的幅度强于工资，从而在标准假设下恢复了唯一的内生有效城市规模。该框架嵌套了现有的经典模型，保持可处理性，并与关键的经验规律一致，包括齐普夫定律和观察到的住房价格弹性。我们还将一个单中心城市模型纳入我们的框架。

34875.title: Household Responses to Personalized Risk Information
34875.zh_title: 家庭对个性化风险信息的反应
34875.abstract: We study how personalized information affects household responses to environmental risk. Using data from residential air quality monitors, we exploit the timing of monitor installation and high-frequency fine particulate matter (PM₂.₅) readings to identify responses to new information about indoor pollution risk. We find that indoor PM₂.₅ concentrations decline by 2.5 μg/m³ over the 12 weeks following installation, conditional on contemporaneous outdoor pollution, with effects significantly larger among households with high initial indoor pollution. The indoor-outdoor pollution gradient declines over time, indicating that households become increasingly effective at mitigating exposure when marginal health damages are highest. Using machine learning techniques to infer cooking activity and air purifier adoption, we show that households respond primarily through durable defensive investments rather than reductions in pollution-generating behavior, with back-of-the-envelope calculations implying positive net benefits. Our results suggest that personalized monitoring transforms air pollution from an external threat to avoid into an internal risk that households can control.
34875.zh_abstract: 我们研究个性化信息如何影响家庭对环境风险的反应。利用来自住宅空气质量监测仪的数据，我们利用监测仪安装的时间和高频细颗粒物（PM₂.₅）读数来识别对室内污染风险新信息的反应。我们发现，在控制同期室外污染的条件下，安装后的12周内，室内PM₂.₅浓度下降了2.5 μg/m³，在初始室内污染较高的家庭中效果显著更大。室内外污染梯度随时间下降，表明家庭在边际健康损害最高时，减轻暴露的效果越来越好。利用机器学习技术推断烹饪活动和空气净化器使用情况，我们表明家庭主要通过耐用的防御性投资而非减少产生污染的行为来做出反应，粗略计算表明净收益为正。我们的结果表明，个性化监测将空气污染从一种需要避免的外部威胁转变为一种家庭可以控制的内部风险。
34875.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, PE；JEL：D81, D83, Q53, Q55

34874.title: Job Loss and Health Insurance Coverage Before and After the Affordable Care Act
34874.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》实施前后的失业与健康保险覆盖
34874.abstract: We examine how the Affordable Care Act (ACA) altered the insurance consequences of involuntary job loss. Using matched event-study models with longitudinal survey data, we estimate the causal effects of displacement on insurance coverage before and after implementation of the ACA’s main provisions. Prior to 2014, job loss reduced coverage by approximately 16 percentage points, with losses persisting for more than a year. After the ACA, declines are smaller—about 10 percentage points—and recovery is faster. Gains reflect higher baseline public coverage and reduced post-displacement losses, with the largest improvements among middle income workers previously most exposed to coverage disruptions.
34874.zh_abstract: 我们研究了《平价医疗法案》（ACA）如何改变了非自愿失业的保险后果。使用带有纵向调查数据的匹配事件研究模型，我们估计了在ACA主要条款实施前后，失业对保险覆盖的因果效应。在2014年之前，失业使保险覆盖率降低了约16个百分点，且损失持续超过一年。在ACA之后，下降幅度较小——约10个百分点——且恢复更快。这些改善反映了更高的基线公共保险覆盖率和失业后损失的减少，其中在之前最易受保险中断影响的中等收入工人中改善最大。
34874.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：C23, I13, I18, J65

34873.title: Public Finance in the Age of AI: A Primer
34873.zh_title: 人工智能时代的公共财政：入门指南
34873.abstract: Transformative artificial intelligence (TAI) - machines capable of performing virtually all economically valuable work - may gradually erode the two main tax bases that underpin modern tax systems: labor income and human consumption. We examine optimal taxation across two stages of artificial intelligence (AI)-driven transformation. First, if AI displaces human labor, we find that consumption taxation may serve as a primary revenue instrument, with differential commodity taxation gaining renewed relevance as labor distortions lose their constraining role. In the second stage, as autonomous artificial general intelligence (AGI) systems both produce most economic value and absorb a growing share of resources, taxing human consumption may become an inadequate means of raising revenue. We show that the taxation of autonomous AGI systems can be framed as an optimal harvesting problem and find that the resulting tax rate on AGI depends on the rate at which humans discount the future. Our analysis provides a theoretically grounded approach to balancing efficiency and equity in the Age of AI. We also apply our insights to evaluate specific proposals such as taxes on robots, compute, and tokens, as well as sovereign wealth funds and windfall clauses.
34873.zh_abstract: 变革性人工智能（TAI）——能够执行几乎所有有经济价值工作的机器——可能逐渐侵蚀支撑现代税收制度的两个主要税基：劳动收入和人类消费。我们考察了人工智能（AI）驱动转型两个阶段的最优税收。首先，如果AI取代了人类劳动，我们发现消费税可能作为一种主要的收入工具，而差别商品税在劳动扭曲失去其约束作用时重新获得相关性。在第二阶段，随着自主人工通用智能（AGI）系统既生产大部分经济价值又吸收越来越多的资源，对人类消费征税可能成为筹集资金的不足手段。我们表明，对自主AGI系统的征税可以被构建为一个最优收获问题，并发现由此产生的AGI税率取决于人类对未来贴现的速率。我们的分析为在AI时代平衡效率与公平提供了一种有理论依据的方法。我们还应用我们的见解来评估具体提案，例如对机器人、计算能力和代币征税，以及主权财富基金和暴利条款。
34873.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H21, H24, O33

34870.title: Why Do Firms Pay Different Interest Rates on Their Bank Loans?
34870.zh_title: 为什么企业为其银行贷款支付不同的利率？
34870.authors: Mary Amiti, Anil K Kashyap, Anna Kovner, David Weinstein
34870.abstract: We document significant variation in interest rates among similar commercial and industrial loans using confidential supervisory data on the largest US banks. This dispersion does not appear to be due to risk. We rationalize the data using a search cost model and find that search costs are highest for smaller and riskier borrowers and lower for public firms, consistent with predictable differences in the costs of screening and monitoring. We find that search costs are substantial. Over a third of firms behave as if they do not comparison shop; half of all firms appear to only obtain two quotes before picking a lender, while the remaining firms behave as if they search widely.
34870.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国最大银行的机密监管数据，记录了类似商业和工业贷款利率的显著差异。这种离散似乎并非由风险导致。我们使用一个搜索成本模型来解释这些数据，并发现搜索成本对于较小和风险较高的借款人最高，对于上市公司则较低，这与筛选和监控成本的可预测差异一致。我们发现搜索成本是巨大的。超过三分之一的企业表现得好像它们没有进行比价；一半的企业似乎只获得两个报价就选择了贷款机构，而其余的企业表现得好像它们进行了广泛搜索。

34869.title: Why has Decreasing Schooling Inequality Not Led to Decreasing Earnings Inequality in South Africa?
34869.zh_title: 为什么南非教育不平等程度的下降并未导致收入不平等程度的下降？
34869.authors: David Lam, Murray Leibbrandt, Arden J. Finn, Nicola Branson
34869.abstract: Inequality in education has declined substantially in South Africa since the end of apartheid, with inequality in years of completed education declining by all standard measures of inequality. At the same time, inequality in earnings has not shown significant declines, and has increased by some measures. Given the strong positive relationship between earnings and years of education, why hasn’t the decline in education inequality led to declines in earnings inequality? This paper explores this puzzle from both a theoretical and empirical perspective. We analyse how earnings inequality is affected by changes in returns to schooling when returns increase at some levels of schooling and decrease at other levels. We show that changes in the distribution of education over the 1994-2019 period would have significantly reduced earnings inequality in and of themselves. This was offset by disequalizing changes in the earnings-education gradient, including an increase in relative earnings for those with post-secondary education and a decrease in relative earnings for those with incomplete secondary education. The net result is a combination of decreasing schooling inequality and persistently high earnings inequality,
34869.zh_abstract: 自种族隔离制度结束以来，南非的教育不平等程度已大幅下降，按所有标准的不平等衡量指标，完成教育年限的不平等程度都在下降。与此同时，收入不平等程度并未显著下降，并且按某些衡量指标还有所上升。鉴于收入与受教育年限之间存在强烈的正相关关系，为什么教育不平等程度的下降没有导致收入不平等程度的下降？本文从理论和实证两个角度探讨了这一难题。我们分析了当教育回报在某些教育水平上升而在其他教育水平下降时，教育回报的变化如何影响收入不平等。我们表明，1994-2019年期间教育分布的变化本身本会显著降低收入不平等。但这被收入-教育梯度的不平等化变化所抵消，包括拥有高等教育学历者相对收入的增加和未完成中等教育者相对收入的减少。最终结果是教育不平等程度下降与持续高位的收入不平等并存。

34868.title: Venture Fraud
34868.authors: Alexander Dyck, Freda Fang, Camille Hebert, Ting Xu
34868.abstract: We assemble the first comprehensive sample of venture fraud cases involving 614 U.S. venture capital (VC)-backed startups founded since 2000. We find that VC-backed firms are 54% more likely to face fraud charges than comparable non-VC-backed firms within a subsample of newly public firms where detection likelihood is high and homogeneous. We then examine the role of governance in explaining venture fraud, focusing on two features that have risen in recent years—founder-friendly structures and cap table complexity. In a panel prediction model examining all venture fraud cases, we find that fraud is more likely in startups with stronger founder control rights, more convex founder cash flow rights, more investors, and greater participation of non-traditional investors. Founder-controlled boards are 88% more likely to commit fraud than VC-controlled or shared-control boards, even within the same firm. Governance variables matter much more than founder characteristics in predicting fraud. Hot funding conditions at the initial round, which weaken governance incentives, predict future fraud. Fraudulent entrepreneurs continue to found new VC-backed startups unharmed relative to non-fraudulent entrepreneurs, suggesting a lack of market discipline. Overall, our results highlight rising agency costs in VC-backed firms that could lead to misallocation and broader social costs.
34868.zh_abstract: 我们汇编了第一个全面的风险投资欺诈案例样本，涉及614家自2000年以来成立的、有美国风险投资（VC）支持的初创公司。我们发现，在一个检测可能性高且同质的新上市企业子样本中，有VC支持的公司面临欺诈指控的可能性比可比的无VC支持的公司高54%。然后，我们考察了治理在解释风险投资欺诈中的作用，重点关注近年来兴起的两个特征——创始人友好型结构和股权结构表复杂性。在一个考察所有风险投资欺诈案例的面板预测模型中，我们发现，在创始人控制权更强、创始人现金流权更凸、投资者更多以及非传统投资者参与度更高的初创公司中，欺诈更可能发生。即使在同一个公司内部，创始人控制的董事会实施欺诈的可能性比VC控制或共同控制的董事会高88%。在预测欺诈方面，治理变量比创始人特征重要得多。初始轮次的火热融资条件（这会削弱治理激励）预示着未来的欺诈。欺诈性企业家继续创立新的有VC支持的初创公司，且相对于非欺诈性企业家未受损害，这表明缺乏市场约束。总体而言，我们的结果突显了有VC支持的公司中不断上升的代理成本，这可能导致资源错配和更广泛的社会成本。
34868.meta: Programs：CF, LE, PR；JEL：G24, G3, G38, K22

34867.title: Weather to Arrest
34867.abstract: The positive correlation between high temperatures and crime is well established. I consider how random, within-month daily high temperature and precipitation affects arrests rather than incidents. I analyze jail records of a Prohibition Era southern city with mean summer daily high temperatures of 85�F without modern air conditioning, so outdoor temperatures are salient. I find that each 1�F increase in daily high temperatures leads to a 0.5% to 1.9% increase in all-offense arrests, with the largest effect on violence. I also find that severe droughts have no meaningful effect on violent or public order offenses but lead to a 17.2% increase in the daily number of arrests for fraud, forgery, and related offenses. The results are consistent with a hypothesis that more arrests occur on hot days because more crimes are committed on hot days. The results are also consistent with studies that identify a connection between droughts and crime in modern developing countries.
34867.zh_abstract: 高温与犯罪之间的正相关关系已得到充分证实。我研究了随机的、月内日最高气温和降水如何影响逮捕而非犯罪事件。我分析了一个禁酒令时期南方城市的监狱记录，该城市夏季平均日最高气温为85华氏度，且没有现代空调，因此室外温度是显著的。我发现，日最高气温每升高1华氏度，所有罪行的逮捕人数就会增加0.5%至1.9%，其中对暴力的影响最大。我还发现，严重干旱对暴力或公共秩序犯罪没有显著影响，但会导致每日欺诈、伪造及相关犯罪的逮捕人数增加17.2%。这些结果与一个假设一致，即炎热天气逮捕更多是因为炎热天气犯罪更多。这些结果也与识别现代发展中国家干旱与犯罪之间联系的研究一致。

34866.title: Smartphones, Online Music Streaming, and Traffic Fatalities
34866.zh_title: 智能手机、在线音乐流媒体与交通死亡事故
34866.authors: Vishal R. Patel, Christopher M. Worsham, Michael Liu, Anupam B. Jena
34866.abstract: Modern smartphones present new threats to road safety beyond talking and texting, but the real-world effects are difficult to study. One way to causally assess the impact of smartphones on road safety is to identify arbitrarily timed events during which smartphone-related distraction may exogenously increase – i.e., a situation that relies not on plausibly random variation in who uses smartphones while driving, but when smartphones are used. We investigated the impact of smartphones on road safety by examining traffic fatalities on days when smartphone use likely surges: the release of major music albums. Using event study analysis, we show that music streaming – an indicator for smartphone use, where streaming most often occurs – sharply increases, by nearly 40%, on dates of major music album releases, while U.S. traffic fatalities increase by nearly 15% on those same days. Mobile device use while driving is a known safety issue, but today’s smartphones present new and greater opportunities for driver distraction. Our study indicates how features of these phones may have important impacts on distracted driving and traffic fatalities.
34866.zh_abstract: 现代智能手机在通话和发短信之外，给道路安全带来了新的威胁，但其现实世界的影响难以研究。一种因果评估智能手机对道路安全影响的方法是，识别那些智能手机相关的分心可能外生增加的任意时间事件——即，这种情况不依赖于谁在驾驶时使用智能手机这一看似随机的变化，而是依赖于智能手机何时被使用。我们通过考察智能手机使用可能激增的日子（即主要音乐专辑发行日）的交通死亡事故，来研究智能手机对道路安全的影响。使用事件研究分析，我们表明，在主要音乐专辑发行日期，音乐流媒体（智能手机使用的一个指标，流媒体最常发生）急剧增加近40%，而美国同日的交通死亡事故增加了近15%。驾驶时使用移动设备是一个已知的安全问题，但今天的智能手机为驾驶员分心提供了新的、更大的机会。我们的研究表明，这些手机的功能可能对分心驾驶和交通死亡事故产生重要影响。

34865.title: What Drives Money Competition: Comparative Advantage in Payments versus Reserves
34865.zh_title: 什么驱动了货币竞争：支付与储备中的比较优势
34865.authors: Itay Goldstein, Ming Yang, Yao Zeng
34865.abstract: We study competition between monies that provide separate payment and non-payment (e.g., store-of-value) functions. Our central insight is that payment adoption is governed not by absolute payment superiority, but by comparative advantage between payment and non-payment roles. A money that is “too good” as a store of value may circulate less as a payment instrument, even if it is technologically superior, because agents prefer to hoard it rather than spend it. The model delivers equilibria in which monies either specialize into distinct roles or coexist as payment instruments with one emerging as dominant. These mechanisms provide a unified microfoundation for classic monetary phenomena such as Gresham’s law and the big problem of small change, and offer a new perspective on modern debates over stablecoins and central bank digital currencies (CBDCs). Contrary to the common view that interest-bearing digital currencies necessarily threaten bank deposits, we show that higher yields can weaken payment adoption by raising the opportunity cost of spending. As a result, traditional bank deposits may coexist with, and even retain dominance over, technologically superior digital alternatives.
34865.zh_abstract: 我们研究提供独立支付和非支付（例如，价值储藏）功能的货币之间的竞争。我们的核心见解是，支付采纳并非由绝对的支付优越性决定，而是由支付角色与非支付角色之间的比较优势决定。一种“过于”擅长价值储藏的货币，即使其在技术上更优越，也可能较少作为支付工具流通，因为代理人更倾向于囤积它而不是花费它。该模型得出了均衡状态，其中货币要么专门化于不同的角色，要么作为支付工具共存，其中一种货币成为主导。这些机制为经典的货币现象（如格雷欣法则和小额货币的大问题）提供了统一的微观基础，并为关于稳定币和中央银行数字货币（CBDCs）的现代辩论提供了新视角。与普遍认为付息数字货币必然威胁银行存款的观点相反，我们表明，更高的收益率会通过提高支出的机会成本来削弱支付采纳。因此，传统的银行存款可能与技术上更优越的数字替代品共存，甚至保持主导地位。
34865.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E41, E42, E58, F33, G21, G23

34864.title: Black like us? The Occupational Integration of Black Immigrants
34864.zh_title: 像我们一样黑？黑人移民的职业融合
34864.authors: Mwangi wa Gĩthĩnji, Patrick L. Mason
34864.abstract: This paper examines Black immigrant occupational integration. We create an Index of Revealed Advantage in Migration, which captures international differences in selectivity. Except for Caribbean-English and Other Immigrants, first generation Black immigrants have lower occupational achievement than native-born Non-Hispanic African Americans, that is, “Native born Blacks.” However, second generation Black immigrants have greater occupational achievement Native born Blacks. Except for Caribbean-English and Other Immigrants, first generation Black immigrants have lower occupational achievement than native-born Non-Hispanic white-only Americans that is, “Native born Whites.” Second generation Africans have statistically identical occupational achievement with Native born Whites; otherwise, each group of second generation Black immigrants has lower occupational achievement Native born Whites.
34864.zh_abstract: 本文考察了黑人移民的职业融合。我们创建了一个迁移中显示优势指数，该指数捕捉了国际间的选择性差异。除了加勒比英语裔移民和其他移民外，第一代黑人移民的职业成就低于美国本土出生的非西班牙裔非裔美国人，即“本土出生的黑人”。然而，第二代黑人移民的职业成就高于本土出生的黑人。除了加勒比英语裔移民和其他移民外，第一代黑人移民的职业成就低于美国本土出生的非西班牙裔白人，即“本土出生的白人”。第二代非洲裔移民的职业成就与本土出生的白人在统计上相同；除此之外，每一组第二代黑人移民的职业成就都低于本土出生的白人。

34863.title: Valuation of Regulatory Risk on Pharmaceutical R&D
34863.zh_title: 药品研发监管风险的价值评估
34863.authors: Teresa Corzo Santamaria, Jose Portela, Eduardo S. Schwartz
34863.abstract: Geopolitical tensions, supply-chain concerns and policy risk have moved to the forefront of the pharmaceutical industry. This paper develops a real options valuation model of drug R&D that captures sequential clinical investment with technical failure, stochastic costs, uncertain cash flows, and optimal abandonment. We incorporate two regulatory shocks: a reduction in effective exclusivity period and a price-control shock that reduces net cash flows. Calibrating to an incremental CNS program, we find that project value at initiation is highly right-skewed: the mean is USD 69.6m but the median is negative, so expected value is driven by rare high-upside outcomes. Regulatory risk mainly compresses this upside. Both reductions in effective exclusivity and price-based interventions substantially weaken investment incentives, even when they occur with moderate probability. Value is strongly convex in exclusivity length, with the final years carrying the highest marginal value. We introduce iso-value maps that summarize how time-based and price-based policies substitute in their impact on project valuation, to clarify the trade-offs inherent in regulatory design: losing two years of exclusivity is comparable to roughly a 30% cash-flow contraction. Using a standard revenue-to-R&D elasticity, these valuation effects imply a 10% to 25% long-run contraction in investment. The framework provides a transparent mapping from policy design to project value and investment incentives.
34863.zh_abstract: 地缘政治紧张、供应链担忧和政策风险已移至制药行业的前沿。本文开发了一个药品研发的实物期权估值模型，该模型捕捉了伴随技术失败的顺序临床投资、随机成本、不确定的现金流以及最优放弃。我们纳入了两种监管冲击：有效独占期缩短，以及减少净现金流的价格控制冲击。校准到一个增量型中枢神经系统项目，我们发现项目在启动时的价值高度右偏：均值为6960万美元，但中位数为负，因此预期价值由罕见的高上行结果驱动。监管风险主要压缩了这种上行空间。有效独占期的缩短和基于价格的干预都显著削弱了投资激励，即使它们以中等概率发生。价值在独占期长度上呈现强凸性，最后几年具有最高的边际价值。我们引入了等值图，总结了基于时间的政策和基于价格的政策在影响项目估值方面的替代关系，以阐明监管设计中固有的权衡：失去两年的独占期大约相当于现金流收缩30%。使用标准的收入对研发弹性，这些估值效应意味着长期投资收缩10%至25%。该框架提供了一个从政策设计到项目价值和投资激励的透明映射。

34862.title: Expanding Paternity Leave: Effects on Beliefs, Norms, and Gender Gaps
34862.zh_title: 扩大陪产假：对信念、规范和性别差距的影响
34862.authors: Henrik Kleven, Camille Landais, Anne Sophie S. Lassen, Philip Rosenbaum, Herdis Steingrimsdottir, Jakob Egholt Søgaard
34862.abstract: We study whether policy can shift gendered beliefs, norms, and labor market outcomes by exploiting a major expansion of earmarked paternity leave in Denmark. The reform generated large first-stage effects, substantially reallocating leave from mothers to fathers. Using a regression discontinuity design combined with new survey data linked to administrative records, we show that the reform makes parents more supportive of paternity leave, shifts gender-role beliefs in a progressive direction, and reduces perceived differences in childcare ability. The reform also narrows gender gaps in earnings and hours worked. The earnings gap falls by 34pp in the first year following childbirth (during leave) and by 2.8pp in the second year (after leave). These results demonstrate that policy can meaningfully influence beliefs, norms, and gender inequality. On the other hand, earmarking restricts families’ ability to allocate leave freely and lowers leave satisfaction, highlighting a central trade-off inherent in paternalistic policies.
34862.zh_abstract: 我们研究政策是否能改变性别化的信念、规范和劳动力市场结果，利用丹麦一项指定陪产假的重大扩张。该改革产生了巨大的第一阶段效应，将休假从母亲大幅重新分配给父亲。使用断点回归设计，并结合与行政记录相关联的新调查数据，我们表明，该改革使父母更支持陪产假，将性别角色信念向进步方向转变，并减少了感知到的育儿能力差异。该改革还缩小了收入和工时方面的性别差距。在分娩后的第一年（休假期间），收入差距下降了34个百分点，在第二年（休假后）下降了2.8个百分点。这些结果表明，政策可以有意义地影响信念、规范和性别不平等。另一方面，指定休假限制了家庭自由分配休假的能力，并降低了休假满意度，突显了家长式政策中固有的核心权衡。

34861.title: Machine Learning Meets Markowitz
34861.zh_title: 机器学习遇见马科维茨
34861.authors: Yijie Wang, Hao Gao, Campbell R. Harvey, Yan Liu, Xinyuan Tao
34861.abstract: The standard approach to portfolio selection involves two stages: forecast the asset returns and then plug them into an optimizer. We argue that this separation is deeply problematic. The first stage treats cross-sectional prediction errors as equally important across all securities. However, given that final portfolios might differ given distinct risk preferences and investment restrictions, the standard approach fails to recognize that the investor is not just concerned with the average forecast error - but the precision of the forecasts for the specific assets that are most important for their portfolio. Hence, it is crucial to integrate the two stages. We propose a novel implementation utilizing machine learning tools that unifies the expected return generation process and the final optimized portfolio. Our empirical example provides convincing evidence that our end-to-end method outperforms the traditional two-stage approach. In our framework, each investor has their own, endogenously determined, efficient frontier that depends on risk preferences, investor-specific constraints, as well as exposure to market frictions.
34861.zh_abstract: 投资组合选择的标准方法涉及两个阶段：预测资产收益，然后将它们输入优化器。我们认为这种分离存在严重问题。第一阶段将所有证券的横截面预测误差视为同等重要。然而，鉴于最终投资组合可能因不同的风险偏好和投资限制而不同，标准方法未能认识到投资者不仅关心平均预测误差——还关心对其投资组合最重要的特定资产预测的精确度。因此，整合这两个阶段至关重要。我们提出了一种利用机器学习工具的新颖实现，该实现统一了预期收益生成过程和最终优化投资组合。我们的实证例子提供了令人信服的证据，表明我们的端到端方法优于传统的两阶段方法。在我们的框架中，每个投资者都有自己内生的有效前沿，该前沿取决于风险偏好、投资者特定的约束以及对市场摩擦的暴露。

34860.title: Disparate Impacts of Teacher Certification Exams
34860.zh_title: 教师资格认证考试的不同影响
34860.authors: Christa Deneault, Evan Riehl, Jian Zou
34860.abstract: We use Texas administrative data to assess the long-standing claim that teacher certification exams discriminate against underrepresented minority (URM) candidates. In a regression discontinuity design, we find that failing a certification exam delays entry into teaching and costs the average candidate $\$10,000$ in forgone earnings. These costs fall disproportionately on URM candidates both because they are more likely to fail and because their earnings losses from failing are 50 percent larger on average. To examine whether these disparities are justified by racial/ethnic differences in teaching quality, we develop a new measure of disparate impact and estimate it using a policy change that increased the difficulty of Texas' elementary certification exam. The harder exam reduced the URM share of new teachers but had no significant benefits for teaching quality or student achievement. Taken together, our findings show that certification exams have a disparate impact in the sense that they impose much larger economic costs on URM teaching candidates than on white candidates with similar potential teaching quality.
34860.zh_abstract: 我们使用德克萨斯州的行政数据来评估一个长期存在的说法，即教师资格认证考试歧视代表性不足的少数族裔候选人。在断点回归设计中，我们发现，未能通过认证考试会延迟进入教学领域，并使普通候选人损失10,000美元的预期收入。这些成本不成比例地落在代表性不足的少数族裔候选人身上，既因为他们更可能失败，也因为他们因失败导致的收入损失平均高出50%。为了检验这些差异是否由种族/民族在教学质量上的差异所证明，我们开发了一种新的不同影响衡量指标，并使用一项增加德克萨斯州小学认证考试难度的政策变化来估计它。更难的考试减少了新教师中代表性不足的少数族裔的比例，但对教学质量或学生成绩没有显著益处。综合来看，我们的研究结果表明，认证考试具有不同影响，即它们对具有相似潜在教学质量的代表性不足的少数族裔教学候选人施加了比白人候选人更大的经济成本。

34857.title: Great Expectations: Responses to Current and Future Transfers for Low-Income Individuals
34857.zh_title: 伟大期望：低收入个体对当前和未来转移支付的反应
34857.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Jean-François Gauthier, Pamela Jakiela, Dean Karlan
34857.abstract: How does the expectation of aid change behavior? We propose a simple approach to separate expectations effects from the direct effects of relaxing resource constraints: compare the promise of a program to the program itself. We test this approach in a four-arm randomized controlled trial of cash transfers in Uganda. Both those who received cash and those promised-to-receive cash increase their labor supply and investment. Immediate transfers also increase household expenditures and savings. Our results are not consistent with standard life-cycle models; they are better explained by a model in which the transfer increases individual labor productivity.
34857.zh_abstract: 对援助的期望如何改变行为？我们提出一个简单的方法来将期望效应与放松资源约束的直接效应分离开：比较一个项目的承诺与项目本身。我们在乌干达进行的一项四组随机对照试验中测试了这种方法，该试验涉及现金转移。无论是收到现金的人还是承诺将收到现金的人，都增加了他们的劳动供给和投资。即时转移也增加了家庭支出和储蓄。我们的结果与标准的生命周期模型不一致；它们更好地由一个模型来解释，在该模型中，转移支付提高了个体的劳动生产率。

34856.title: Government Funding and the Direction of Academic Energy Research
34856.zh_title: 政府资助与学术能源研究的方向
34856.authors: David Popp, Myriam Gregoire-Zawilski, Lizhen Liang, Daniel Acuna
34856.abstract: Does government funding influence the choice of research topics? Novel grant-making modalities such as the Advanced Research Projects Agency-Energy (ARPA-E) program aim to encourage scientists to take on difficult-to-solve, wicked societal problems such as clean energy. Yet little causal evidence exists linking funding and research direction, with most existing studies focusing on health sciences. We provide new evidence on the effect of funding on clean energy research, addressing two questions: (1) Do scientists change the focus of their research in response to targeted government funding opportunities? (2) If so, what types of calls for funding best attract new researchers? Using data on grants from the Department of Energy and National Science Foundation, we combine text and regression analyses to compare the publication trajectories of funded scientists to a set of matched controls. After funding, the research of funded scientists becomes more similar to the grant topic than that of the matched controls. The effect is largest for ARPA-E, which explicitly aims to attract new scientists to clean energy research, suggesting that agency efforts to attract new researchers to a topic area can succeed. General calls for funding such as offered by traditional NSF directorates generate less movement.
34856.zh_abstract: 政府资助是否会影响研究课题的选择？诸如高级研究计划局-能源（ARPA-E）项目等新颖的拨款模式，旨在鼓励科学家应对清洁能源等难以解决的、棘手的社会问题。然而，将资助与研究方向联系起来的因果证据很少，现有研究大多集中在健康科学领域。我们提供了关于资助对清洁能源研究影响的新证据，探讨了两个问题：(1) 科学家是否会根据有针对性的政府资助机会改变其研究重点？(2) 如果是，哪种类型的资助征集最能吸引新的研究人员？利用来自能源部和国家科学基金会的资助数据，我们结合文本分析和回归分析，将受资助科学家的发表轨迹与一组匹配的对照组进行比较。获得资助后，受资助科学家的研究比匹配对照组的研究更接近资助课题。这种效应在ARPA-E项目中最大，该项目明确旨在吸引新科学家进入清洁能源研究领域，这表明机构为吸引新研究人员进入某一课题领域所做的努力可以取得成功。传统的国家科学基金会理事会等提供的通用资助征集产生的变动较小。

34855.title: Trading Goods for Lives: NAFTA’s Mortality Impacts and Implications
34855.zh_title: 用商品换生命：北美自由贸易协定（NAFTA）的死亡率影响及其启示
34855.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Matthew J. Notowidigdo, Steven X. Shi
34855.abstract: We estimate the mortality effects of local labor market exposure to NAFTA and compare them to the mortality effects of other U.S. local labor market contractions. Areas more exposed to NAFTA experienced sustained increases in mortality over the subsequent 15 years. Mortality increases occurred for all broad demographic groups, but were especially pronounced among working-age men. Extending the analysis to other economic contractions, we show that the health consequences depend critically on which sectors bear the losses: declines in manufacturing employment increase local area mortality, while declines in non-manufacturing employment reduce it.
34855.zh_abstract: 我们估算了当地劳动力市场受北美自由贸易协定（NAFTA）冲击的死亡率效应，并将其与其他美国当地劳动力市场收缩的死亡率效应进行了比较。受NAFTA影响更大的地区，在随后的15年中死亡率持续上升。所有广泛的人口群体死亡率均有所上升，但在劳动年龄男性中尤为显著。将分析扩展到其他经济收缩情况，我们表明健康后果关键取决于哪些行业承受损失：制造业就业的下降会增加当地死亡率，而非制造业就业的下降则会降低当地死亡率。

34854.title: Building Pro-Worker Artificial Intelligence
34854.zh_title: 构建支持劳动者的人工智能
34854.authors: Daron Acemoglu, David Autor, Simon Johnson
34854.abstract: This paper defines pro-worker technologies, including Artificial Intelligence, as technologies that make human skills and expertise more valuable by expanding worker capabilities. Our conceptual framework distinguishes among five categories of technological change: labor-augmenting, capital-augmenting, automating, expertise-leveling, and new task-creating. Only the last category is unambiguously pro-worker, generating demand for novel human expertise rather than commodifying it. We illustrate these distinctions through hypothetical and real-world examples spanning aviation maintenance, electrical services, custodial work, education, patent examination, and gig delivery. While AI’s capacity to automate work is substantial, we argue that its potential to serve as a collaborator, by extending human judgment, enabling new tasks, and accelerating skill acquisition, is equally transformative and currently underexploited. We identify market failures, including misaligned firm and developer incentives, path dependence, and a pervasive pro-automation ideology, that may lead to underinvestment in pro-worker AI. We consider nine policy directions that would change incentives, including targeted investments in health care and education, tax code reform, antitrust enforcement, and intellectual property protections for worker expertise.
34854.zh_abstract: 本文将支持劳动者的技术（包括人工智能）定义为通过扩展工人能力来提升人类技能和专业知识价值的技术。我们的概念框架区分了五种技术变革类别：劳动增强型、资本增强型、自动化型、专业知识均等化型和创造新任务型。只有最后一类明确是支持劳动者的，它创造了对新型人类专业知识的需求，而非将其商品化。我们通过假设和现实世界的例子来说明这些区别，涵盖航空维修、电气服务、保管工作、教育、专利审查和零工配送等领域。虽然人工智能自动化工作的能力很强，但我们认为，它作为协作者——通过扩展人类判断、实现新任务和加速技能获取——的潜力同样具有变革性，且目前尚未得到充分利用。我们识别出可能导致对支持劳动者的人工智能投资不足的市场失灵，包括企业和开发者激励错位、路径依赖以及普遍存在的支持自动化的意识形态。我们考虑了九种能够改变激励措施的政策方向，包括对医疗保健和教育的定向投资、税法改革、反垄断执法以及对工人专业知识的知识产权保护。
34854.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：J23, J24, J31, M50, O33

34899.title: Capital Structure, Seniority, and Risk Premia: Evidence from the London Stock Exchange, 1870–1929
34899.zh_title: 资本结构、优先性与风险溢价：来自伦敦证券交易所的证据，1870–1929
34899.authors: William N. Goetzmann, K. Geert Rouwenhorst
34899.abstract: We use security-level data from the Investors Monthly Manual (IMM) to construct capital-weighted return indexes for the London Stock Exchange over the period 1870–1929. We find a significant and persistent equity risk premium of 3.7% over commercial paper and 4.5% over long-term government bonds, with significant co-movement with GDP growth. Returns decline monotonically with claim seniority: common stocks earn more than preferred shares, which earn more than corporate bonds. Both equity risk premia are highly significant, and the rolling 10-year return spread for stocks minus bonds is positive for every interval in the 60-year sample period.
34899.zh_abstract: 我们使用《投资者月刊手册》（IMM）中的证券层面数据，构建了1870–1929年期间伦敦证券交易所的资本加权回报指数。我们发现，相对于商业票据存在3.7%的显著且持久的股权风险溢价，相对于长期政府债券则为4.5%，并且与GDP增长存在显著的共同变动。回报率随债权优先级的降低而单调递减：普通股收益高于优先股，优先股收益高于公司债券。两种股权风险溢价均高度显著，并且在60年的样本期内，股票减去债券的滚动10年回报率差在每个区间均为正值。
34899.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G1, G10, G12, G30, G32, N20

34898.title: What Threshold Should be Applied to Tests of Factor Models?
34898.zh_title: 因子模型检验应应用何种阈值？
34898.authors: Campbell R. Harvey, Alessio Sancetta, Yuqian Zhao
34898.abstract: Researchers generally acknowledge that statistical tests must be adjusted when hundreds of factors and trading strategies have been examined. But how should these adjustments be made? Existing methods are often misunderstood or misapplied. We show that proper inference requires accounting for dependence across tests, correctly specifying the null distribution, and mitigating sample-selection bias. We develop a simple framework that avoids assumptions about the total number of tests run and yields a lower bound on valid significance thresholds - implying that researchers should employ a t-statistic cutoff of at least 3.0. In addition, we advocate using the local False Discovery Rate, which provides the probability that the null hypothesis is true for a given test-statistic realization - information that a conventional p-value cannot supply.
34898.zh_abstract: 研究人员普遍承认，当数百个因子和交易策略被检验时，必须对统计检验进行调整。但这些调整应如何进行？现有方法常常被误解或误用。我们表明，正确的推断需要考虑检验之间的依赖性、正确设定原假设分布以及减轻样本选择偏差。我们开发了一个简单的框架，避免了对已运行检验总数的假设，并得出了有效显著性阈值的下界——这意味着研究人员应使用至少3.0的t统计量截断值。此外，我们提倡使用局部错误发现率，它提供了对于给定检验统计量实现值原假设为真的概率——这是传统p值无法提供的信息。

34897.title: Scanner Data, Product Churn and Quality Adjustment
34897.zh_title: 扫描数据、产品更替与质量调整
34897.abstract: High technology products are characterized by the rapid introduction of new models and the corresponding disappearance of older models. The paper addresses the problems associated with the construction of price indexes for these products. Several methods for the quality adjustment of product prices are considered: hedonic regressions that use either product characteristics (Time Dummy Characteristics regressions) or the product itself as the ultimate characteristic (Time Product Dummy regressions). The paper also considered regressions where the economic importance of products is taken into account (weighted versus unweighted regressions). The indexes which were generated by the hedonic regressions were compared to traditional index numbers that did not make any special adjustments for quality change. The Expanding Window variant of a Weighted Time Product Dummy regression was used to address the chain drift problem. Finally, the estimation of systems of inverse demand functions was also used to generate various price indexes. The alternative approaches were implemented using Japanese price and quantity data on laptop sales in Japan for the 24 months over the years 2020-2021.
34897.zh_abstract: 高科技产品的特点是新模型的快速引入以及相应旧模型的消失。本文探讨了为这些产品构建价格指数所涉及的问题。考虑了多种产品质量调整方法：使用产品特征的特征回归（时间虚拟变量特征回归）或将产品本身作为最终特征的时间产品虚拟变量回归。本文还考虑了考虑产品经济重要性的回归（加权与未加权回归）。将由特征回归生成的指数与未对质量变化进行任何特殊调整的传统指数进行了比较。采用加权时间产品虚拟变量回归的扩展窗口变体来解决链漂移问题。最后，还使用逆需求函数系统的估计来生成各种价格指数。这些替代方法使用了2020-2021年24个月期间日本笔记本电脑销售的日本价格和数量数据来实施。

34896.title: Are Macro Shocks Second Order?
34896.authors: Michail Anthropelos, Jasmina Hasanhodzic, Laurence J. Kotlikoff
34896.abstract: This paper addresses two fundamental macroeconomics questions. First, are macro shocks large enough to alter the course of the economy? Second, are they large enough to materially impact economic welfare? Lucas and many others have addressed these issues, but do so primarily in the context of representative agent models. We study these questions using a large-scale, general equilibrium, stochastic, overlapping generations model. We consider 80 generations overlapping in an economy buffeted by realistically calibrated total factor productivity and capital depreciation shocks. The model is solved using Marcet’s projection method taking explicit account of the full state space, which comprises 81 variables. Our findings, some recapitulated from prior studies by Hasanhodzic and Kotlikoff, suggest macro shocks are second order both with respect to their impact on aggregate variables and individual welfare. Specifically, the probability that the stochastic economy’s long-run aggregates materially deviate from their deterministic counterparts is less than one percent. Furthermore, the realized (simulated) lifetime utility of generations born in the long run rarely differs from deterministic long-run utility levels by more than 1 percent, measured as consumption-compensating differentials. These findings are supported by the model’s small equity premium. Moreover, they are essentially indifferent to the presence of a bond market. Both results suggest agents are minimally concerned with precautionary savings against these shocks. Our RBC-in-OLG findings suggest that what really moves the macroeconomy and demands attention is policy, not shocks.
34896.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了两个基本的宏观经济学问题。第一，宏观冲击是否足够大以至于能够改变经济进程？第二，它们是否足够大以至于能够实质性影响经济福利？卢卡斯和许多其他人已经探讨过这些问题，但主要是在代表性代理人模型的背景下进行的。我们使用一个大规模、一般均衡、随机、世代交叠模型来研究这些问题。我们考虑了在一个受到现实校准的全要素生产率和资本折旧冲击影响的经济中交叠的80代人。该模型使用Marcet的投影方法求解，明确考虑了包含81个变量的完整状态空间。我们的发现，部分重复了Hasanhodzic和Kotlikoff先前的研究，表明宏观冲击无论是对其总量变量的影响还是对个体福利的影响都是二阶的。具体来说，随机经济的长期总量实质性偏离其确定性对应物的概率小于百分之一。此外，以消费补偿差异衡量，长期内出生的世代所实现的（模拟）终生效用很少与确定性长期效用水平相差超过1%。这些发现得到了模型较小的股权溢价的支持。此外，它们基本上不受债券市场存在的影响。这两个结果都表明，代理人几乎不关心针对这些冲击的预防性储蓄。我们的OLG框架下的RBC发现表明，真正推动宏观经济并需要关注的是政策，而非冲击。

34895.title: Minimum Wages and Rise of the Robots
34895.zh_title: 最低工资与机器人崛起
34895.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, J. Frank Li, Javier Miranda, Robert Seamans, Andrew J. Wang
34895.abstract: This paper studies how minimum wage policy affects firms’ adoption of automation technologies. Using both state-level measures of robot exposure and novel plant-level data on industrial robot imports linked to U.S. Census microdata from 1992–2021, we show that increases in minimum wages raise the likelihood of robot adoption in manufacturing. Our preferred identification exploits discontinuities at state borders, comparing otherwise similar firms exposed to different wage floors. Across specifications, a 10 percent increase in the minimum wage increases robot adoption by roughly 8 percent relative to the mean.
34895.zh_abstract: 本文研究最低工资政策如何影响企业采用自动化技术。利用州级机器人暴露度指标以及与美国人口普查局1992-2021年微观数据相关联的新颖工厂级工业机器人进口数据，我们表明最低工资的提高增加了制造业中机器人采用的可能性。我们偏好的识别方法利用了州界上的不连续性，比较了面临不同工资下限的原本相似的企业。在各种设定下，最低工资每提高10%，机器人采用率相对于均值大约增加8%。

34894.title: Inflation vs Inclusion: Stabilization Policy in the Wake of the Pandemic
34894.zh_title: 通胀与包容：疫情后的稳定政策
34894.abstract: As the economy emerges from a crisis, macroeconomic policy confronts a dilemma: a protracted stimulus can foster a more inclusive labor market recovery, yet risks igniting inflation that ultimately undermines workers’ welfare through real income erosion. This tension amplifies in the presence of the ZLB and aggregate capacity constraints. We embed this insight into a quantitative model of the US economy. We study how monetary and fiscal policies managed this inflation-inclusion trade-off after the pandemic, contrasting actual outcomes with counterfactual scenarios. Our experiments yield five findings: (i) the trade-off was unusually difficult because policy was squeezed between these two constraints; (ii) inflationary pressures arose from the joint deployment of prolonged monetary and fiscal stimulus; either policy alone would have produced milder price dynamics; (iii) either inclusive fiscal policy or inclusive monetary policy in isolation would have been sufficient to contain the negative labor market hysteresis at the bottom of the distribution; (iv) inclusive fiscal policy combined with a more traditionally inflation-focused central bank would have achieved higher welfare for the vast majority of households; (v) welfare effects reflect mostly corrections of incomplete-market inefficiencies rather than gains from aggregate stabilization.
34894.zh_abstract: 随着经济从危机中复苏，宏观经济政策面临一个两难困境：持续的刺激措施可以促进更具包容性的劳动力市场复苏，但有可能引发通胀，最终通过实际收入侵蚀损害工人的福利。这种紧张关系在存在零下限和总产能约束时会加剧。我们将这一见解嵌入一个美国经济的量化模型中。我们研究了货币和财政政策如何在疫情后管理这种通胀-包容权衡，将实际结果与反事实情景进行对比。我们的实验得出了五个发现：（i）由于政策在这两个约束之间受到挤压，这种权衡异常困难；（ii）通胀压力源于长期货币和财政刺激措施的联合部署；单独实施其中任何一种政策都会产生更温和的价格动态；（iii）无论是包容性财政政策还是包容性货币政策，单独实施都足以遏制分布底部的负面劳动力市场滞后效应；（iv）包容性财政政策与更传统的以通胀为中心的央行相结合，将为绝大多数家庭带来更高的福利；（v）福利效应主要反映了对不完全市场效率低下的纠正，而非来自总量稳定的收益。
34894.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E24, E31, E32, J24, J30, J64

34893.title: Ray of Hope? China and the Rise of Solar Energy
34893.zh_title: 希望之光？中国与太阳能的崛起
34893.authors: Ignacio Banares-Sanchez, Robin Burgess, Dávid László, Pol Simpson, John Van Reenen, Yifan Wang
34893.abstract: Do industrial policies that promote clean energy offer a “ray of hope”, increasing a country’s growth and welfare, whilst simultaneously reducing carbon emissions? We study the impact of Chinese solar subsidies whose implementation by city-regions went alongside massive expansion of the sector and a dramatic fall in global solar prices. We construct new city and firm panel data on solar policies, patenting and output. Using synthetic-difference-in-differences 2004-2020, we find production and innovation subsidies were more effective than demand-side (installation) subsidies in generating large and persistent increases in local innovation, net entry, production and exports. Demand policies did, however, reduce local pollution. To examine aggregate effects, we build and structurally estimate a quantitative spatial model with endogenous innovation and heterogeneous productivity across firms and cities, which accounts for business stealing and knowledge spillovers. Counterfactual analysis shows that: (i) local effects remain substantial at the macro level explaining 40%-50% of the aggregate changes in solar innovation, prices and revenues; (ii) social benefits to Chinese citizens exceed subsidy costs by 65% (and double this when environmental benefits are included); and (iii) although all subsidy types increase welfare, innovation subsidies are the most cost-effective.
34893.zh_abstract: 促进清洁能源的产业政策是否提供了“一线希望”，在增加国家增长和福利的同时减少碳排放？我们研究了中国太阳能补贴的影响，这些补贴由城市地区实施，伴随着该行业的巨大扩张和全球太阳能价格的急剧下降。我们构建了关于太阳能政策、专利和产出的新城市和企业面板数据。使用2004-2020年的合成双重差分法，我们发现生产和创新补贴比需求侧（安装）补贴在产生本地创新、净进入、生产和出口的大幅且持续增长方面更有效。然而，需求政策确实减少了本地污染。为了考察总体效应，我们构建并结构性地估计了一个包含内生创新以及跨企业和城市异质性生产率的量化空间模型，该模型考虑了业务窃取和知识溢出。反事实分析表明：（i）本地效应在宏观层面仍然显著，解释了太阳能创新、价格和收入总体变化的40%-50%；（ii）对中国公民的社会效益超过补贴成本65%（若包含环境效益则翻倍）；（iii）尽管所有补贴类型都增加了福利，但创新补贴最具成本效益。
34893.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE, PR；JEL：H25, L25, L5, L52, N5, O31

34892.title: Interest Rate Risk and Cross-Sectional Effects of Micro-Prudential Regulation
34892.zh_title: 利率风险与微观审慎监管的截面效应
34892.authors: Juliane Begenau, Vadim Elenev, Tim Landvoigt
34892.abstract: This paper investigates financial stability risks arising from banks' interest rate exposure and uninsured deposit funding. We develop a model of heterogeneous banks featuring endogenous run risk to jointly analyze portfolio and funding choices. The model replicates key empirical patterns, including the concentration of uninsured deposits in larger banks. We analyze the impact of monetary policy rate hikes and evaluate the capacity of microprudential tools to mitigate bank fragility. Results demonstrate that tightening capital requirements significantly lowers run risk. Higher liquidity requirements targeting uninsured deposits efficiently reduce run risk, provided they are met exclusively with reserves.
34892.zh_abstract: 本文研究了由银行利率风险暴露和无保险存款融资引发的金融稳定风险。我们构建了一个包含内生挤兑风险的异质性银行模型，以联合分析其投资组合和融资选择。该模型复现了关键的经验模式，包括无保险存款集中于大型银行。我们分析了货币政策加息的影响，并评估了微观审慎工具缓解银行脆弱性的能力。结果表明，收紧资本要求显著降低了挤兑风险。针对无保险存款的更高流动性要求，若能完全以准备金满足，则能有效降低挤兑风险。

34891.title: Consumption Wedges: Measuring and Diagnosing Distortions
34891.zh_title: 消费楔子：衡量与诊断扭曲
34891.authors: Sasha Indarte, Raymond Kluender, Ulrike Malmendier, Michael Stepner
34891.abstract: Ample empirical evidence documents deviations from the canonical consumption-savings model; yet, it remains difficult to assess the roles of different underlying distortions, such as financial constraints and behavioral preferences. We develop a sufficient-statistics approach that measures individual-level wedges between observed and counterfactual “frictionless” consumption. Since different distortions imply different wedge properties, wedges provide a diagnostic to distinguish between models. We measure wedges using administrative transactions data linked to surveyed expectations for a population of middle-income, low-liquidity US consumers. The expectations data allow us to distinguish wedges attributable to frictions and behavioral preferences from wedges driven by deviations from full-information rational expectations (FIRE). We find that consumption wedges are large and heterogeneous: the median wedge is 40% of frictionless consumption in absolute value, with 49% of consumers under-consuming (negative wedges) and 51% over-consuming (positive wedges). Borrowing constraints cannot rationalize this pattern because they only generate negative wedges. Models combining present bias with borrowing constraints, or featuring consumption adjustment costs, best account for the wedge properties we document.
34891.zh_abstract: 大量经验证据记录了与经典消费-储蓄模型的偏离；然而，评估不同潜在扭曲（如金融约束和行为偏好）的作用仍然困难。我们开发了一种充分统计量方法，用于衡量个体层面观测消费与反事实“无摩擦”消费之间的楔子。由于不同的扭曲意味着不同的楔子属性，楔子提供了一种区分不同模型的诊断工具。我们利用与调查预期相关联的行政交易数据，针对一群中等收入、低流动性的美国消费者来衡量楔子。预期数据使我们能够将归因于摩擦和行为偏好的楔子，与由完全信息理性预期（FIRE）偏离驱动的楔子区分开来。我们发现消费楔子很大且具有异质性：中位数楔子绝对值达到无摩擦消费的40%，其中49%的消费者消费不足（负楔子），51%的消费者过度消费（正楔子）。借贷约束无法解释这一模式，因为它们只会产生负楔子。结合了现时偏向与借贷约束的模型，或具有消费调整成本的模型，最能解释我们所记录的楔子属性。

34890.title: Improving Organ Procurement Operations
34890.authors: Hammaad Adam, Nikhil Agarwal, Marzyeh Ghassemi
34890.abstract: We study how decisions made by organ procurement organizations (OPOs)—non-profits that coordinate organ recovery from deceased donors—affect the availability of organs for transplant in the United States. We develop a structural econometric model of a pivotal OPO decision: whether to approach a potential donor’s family to request authorization for donation. Our model conceptualizes this decision in two parts. The OPO first estimates the probabilities of two downstream outcomes: authorization (i.e., family consent) and transplant (i.e., whether the donated organs would be successfully transplanted). It then applies a cost-benefit decision rule that maps these estimates to an approach decision. Our model separately identifies the OPO’s beliefs (i.e., probability estimates), its preferences (i.e., costs / benefits), and the true probabilities of authorization and transplant. We apply our model to a dataset of 35,856 potential donors referred to four OPOs between 2016 and 2021. We find that OPOs missed a substantial number of donation opportunities, recovering organs from only 39% of transplantable donors. Of these missed opportunities, an estimated 16% resulted from conservative preferences, 12% from miscalibrated beliefs, and the remaining 72% from family declines. We conduct a detailed counterfactual policy evaluation to identify impactful and actionable changes to OPO decisions. We find that drastically increasing approach rates would allow OPOs to recover organs from 43% more donors, creating over $\$100$ million in additional annual societal benefit.
34890.zh_abstract: 我们研究了器官获取组织（OPO）——协调从已故捐赠者处获取器官的非营利组织——的决策如何影响美国可用于移植的器官数量。我们构建了一个关于OPO关键决策的结构性计量经济学模型：是否接触潜在捐赠者家属以请求捐赠授权。我们的模型将这一决策分为两部分进行概念化。OPO首先估计两个下游结果的概率：授权（即家属同意）和移植（即捐赠的器官能否成功移植）。然后，它应用一个成本-收益决策规则，将这些估计映射到接触决策。我们的模型分别识别了OPO的信念（即概率估计）、其偏好（即成本/收益），以及授权和移植的真实概率。我们将模型应用于2016年至2021年间转介给四个OPO的35,856名潜在捐赠者的数据集。我们发现OPO错过了大量捐赠机会，仅从39%的可移植捐赠者那里获取了器官。在这些错失的机会中，估计有16%源于保守的偏好，12%源于校准错误的信念，其余72%源于家属拒绝。我们进行了详细的反事实政策评估，以确定对OPO决策有影响且可操作的改变。我们发现，大幅提高接触率将使OPO能够从比现在多43%的捐赠者那里获取器官，每年创造超过1亿美元的额外社会效益。
